The Xenolinguist stories are fast-paced, gripping explorations of cross-cultural communication as well as perennial fan favorites. The Nebula Award–winning novella Reading the Bones has now been expanded to novel length, following xenolinguist Ries Danyo and sisters Lita and Jilan Patel to their pivotal roles in shaping the future of the Frehti.

yesterdayskin.description_text:
Aliens have landed in New York.

A deadly cloud of spores has already infected and killed the inhabitants of two worlds. Now that plague is heading for Earth and threatens humans and aliens alike. Can either species be trusted to find the cure?

Geneticist Marianne Jenner is immersed in the desperate race to save humanity, yet her family is tearing itself apart. Siblings Elizabeth and Ryan are strident isolationists who agree only that an alien conspiracy is in play. Marianne’s youngest, Noah, is a loner addicted to a drug that constantly changes his identity. But between the four Jenners, the course of human history will be forever altered.

Earth’s most elite scientists have ten months to prevent human extinction—and not everyone is willing to wait.

apesofwrath.callout: Winner of the Nebula Award, the Theodore Sturgeon Award, and Locus Award
apesofwrath.description_text:
In the Rue Morgue, the jungles of Tarzan, the fables of Aesop, and outer space, the apes in these seventeen fantastic tales boldly go where humans dare not. Including a foreword from Rupert Wyatt, the director of Rise of the Planet of the Apes, this provocative anthology delves into our fascination with and fear of our simian cousins.

“Evil Robot Monkey” introduces a disgruntled chimp implanted with a chip that makes him cleverer than both his cohort and humans alike. In “Murders in the Rue Morgue,” a murder mystery unravels with the discovery of a hair that does not appear quite human. Merging steampunk with slapstick, “The Ape-Box Affair” has a not-so-ordinary orangutan landing on Earth in a spherical flying ship—where he is promptly mistaken for an alien. King Kong sets a terrible example with booze and Barbie dolls in “Godzilla’s 12-Step Program.”

If you’ve ever wondered what makes humans different from apes, soon you’ll be asking yourself, is it even less than we think?

dreamsofdistantshores.callout: Winner of the Endeavour Award and the Mythopoeic Fantasy Award
dreamsofdistantshores.description_text:
Bestselling author Patricia A. McKillip (The Riddle-Master of Hed) is one of the most lyrical writers gracing the fantasy genre. With the debut of her newest work, Dreams of Distant Shores is a true ode to her many talents. Within these pages you will find a youthful artist possessed by both his painting and his muse and seductive travelers from the sea enrapturing distant lovers. The statue of a mermaid comes suddenly to life, and two friends are transfixed by a haunted estate.

Fans of McKillip’s ethereal fiction will find much to delight them; those lucky enough to be discovering her work will find much to enchant them.

thenewvoicesoffantasy.callout: Winner of the World Fantasy Award
thenewvoicesoffantasy.description_text:
What would you do if a tornado wanted you to be its Valentine? Or if a haunted spacesuit banged on your door? When is the ideal time to turn into a tiger? Would you post a supernatural portal on Craigslist?

In these nineteen stories, the enfants terribles of fantasy have entered the building—a love-starved, ambulatory skyscraper. The New Voices of Fantasy tethers some of the fastest-rising talents of the last five years. Their tales were hand-picked by the legendary Peter S. Beagle (The Last Unicorn) and genre expert Jacob Weisman (The Treasury of the Fantastic).

So go ahead, join the Communist revolution of the honeybees. The new kids got your back.

developers.developer-name: Peter S. Beagle and Jacob Weisman, Editors

verybestoffandsf2.callout: Winner of the Hugo Award, the World Fantasy Award, the Nebula Award, the Locus Award, and the British Fantasy Award
verybestoffandsf2.description_text:
A mutant baby goes on a rampage through Central Park. An immigrant reveals secrets in the folds of a perfect gift. Lucky Cats extend their virtual paws to salute a generous revolution. The Internet invades a third-world village.

The premier speculative-fiction magazine Fantasy & Science Fiction continues to discover and showcase many of the most inventive authors writing in any genre. Now drawing even more deeply upon F&SF’s impressive history, this extraordinary companion anthology expands upon sixty-five years’ worth of top-notch storytelling. The Very Best of Fantasy & Science Fiction, Volume Two is a star-studded tribute to the continuing vision of F&SF.

fourprofoundweaves.callout: Finalist for the World Fantasy Award and the Nebula Award
fourprofoundweaves.description_text:
Wind: To match one’s body with one’s heart

Sand: To take the bearer where they wish

Song: In praise of the goddess Bird

Bone: To move unheard in the night

The Surun’ nomads do not speak of the master weaver, Benesret, who creates the cloth of bone for assassins in the Great Burri Desert. But aged Uiziya must find her aunt in order to learn the final weave, although the price for knowledge may be far too dear to pay.

Among the Khana in the springflower city of Iyar, women travel in caravans to trade, while men remain in the inner quarter, as scholars. A nameless man struggles to embody Khana masculinity, after many years of performing the life of a woman, trader, wife, and grandmother.

As his past catches up, the nameless man must choose between the life he dreamed of and Uiziya—while Uiziya must discover how to challenge the evil Ruler of Iyar, and to weave from deaths that matter.

In this breathtaking debut set in R. B. Lemberg’s beloved Birdverse, The Four Profound Weaves offers a timeless chronicle of claiming one’s identity in a hostile world.

centralstation.callout: Winner of the John W. Campbell Award, the Xingyun Award, and the Neukom Institute Literary Arts Award
centralstation.description_text:
“Tidhar scatters brilliant ideas like pennies on the sidewalk.”

—NPR Books

A worldwide diaspora has left a quarter of a million people at the foot of a space station. Cultures collide in real life and virtual reality. Life is cheap, and data is cheaper.

When Boris Chong returns to Tel Aviv from Mars, much has changed. Boris’s ex-lover is raising a strangely familiar child who can tap into the datastream of a mind with the touch of a finger. His cousin is infatuated with a robotnik—a damaged cyborg soldier who might as well be begging for parts. His father is terminally-ill with a multigenerational mind-plague. And a hunted data-vampire has followed Boris to where she is forbidden to return.

Rising above them is Central Station, the interplanetary hub between all things: the constantly shifting Tel Aviv; a powerful virtual arena, and the space colonies where humanity has gone to escape the ravages of poverty and war. Everything is connected by the Others, powerful alien entities who, through the Conversation—a shifting, flowing stream of consciousness—are just the beginning of irrevocable change.

At Central Station, humans and machines continue to adapt, thrive . . . and even evolve.

freeze-framerevolution.callout: Winner of the Nowa Fantastyka Prize
freeze-framerevolution.description_text:
“This—THIS—is the cutting edge of science fiction.” —Richard K. Morgan, author of Altered Carbon

How do you stage a mutiny when you’re only awake one day in a million? How do you conspire when your tiny handful of potential allies changes with each job shift? How do you engage an enemy that never sleeps, that sees through your eyes and hears through your ears, and relentlessly, honestly, only wants what’s best for you? Trapped aboard the starship Eriophora, Sunday Ahzmundin is about to discover the components of any successful revolution: conspiracy, code—and unavoidable casualties.

asylumofdrcaligari.callout: Finalist for the Shirley Jackson Award
asylumofdrcaligari.description_text:
“It really reminds me of Wes Anderson’s Grand Budapest Hotel . . . sumptuous and philosophical, thought-provoking as well as just good fun.”

—Art District Radio

It is the summer of 1914. As the world teeters on the brink of war, a naive American arrives at a renowned European insane asylum. There he begins offering art therapy overseen by Dr. Caligari: sinister psychiatrist, maniacal artist, and alleged sorcerer.

Dr. Caligari will—for a price—allow governments to parade their troops past his masterpiece: a hypnotic painting that enrages entire regiments. As the doctor’s outrageous scheme unfolds, Francis joins with his brilliant, spider-obsessed student, Ilona Wessels, and a band of lunatic saboteurs, to thwart the mercenary magic.

Master satirist James Morrow (Towing Jehovah)’s timely tale is funny, tender, and bayonet-sharp.

afterthefall_beforethefall_duringthefall.human_name: After the Fall, Before the Fall, During the Fall
afterthefall_beforethefall_duringthefall.description_text:
Nebula Award Winner

In the year 2035, all that is left of humanity lives in the Shell.

No one knows why the Tesslies attacked Earth, devastated the environment, and nearly destroyed humanity. Or, why the aliens imprisoned twenty-six survivors in a sterile enclosure built on the barren remains of the Earth.

In the year 2013, a brilliant CIA consultant sees a pattern in seemingly unrelated kidnappings. Her predictive algorithms reveal that the world is in imminent danger, she discovers that she may assist in its rebirth.

The past and the present are converging in time—a chance encounter may be the Earth’s only hope.

burn.description_text:
“Burn is James Patrick Kelly at his best, and there’s nothing better.”

—Connie Willis, author of Doomsday Book

The tiny planet Morobe’s Pea has been sold and renamed Walden. The new owner has some interesting ideas. Voluntary simplicity will rule in the Transcendent State; Walden is destined to become a paradise covered in lush new forests.

But even believers find temptations in the black markets; non-believers are willing to defend their ideals with fire. Walden’s only hope may lie with a third option: a very unlikely alien intervention.

In Burn, James Patrick Kelly (“Think Like a Dinosaur”) delivers an innovative, entertaining, and morally-complex vision of the perils of idealism.

biblerepairman.callout: Winner of the World Fantasy Award
biblerepairman.description_text:
In his first new collection since 2005, Tim Powers, the master of the secret history, delves into the mysteries of souls, whether they are sacrificed on the pinnacle of Mount Parnassus or lodged in a television cable box.

With two new stories and short fiction only previously available in limited editions, the cornerstone of the collection is a postscript to his harrowing novel of the haunting of the Romantic poets, The Stress of Her Regard. After Byron and Shelley break free of the succubus that claimed them, their associate, Trelawny, forges an alliance with Greek rebels to reestablish the deadly connection between man and the nephilim.

Meanwhile, in a Kabbalistic story of transformation, the executor of an old friend’s will is duped into housing his soul, but for the grace of the family cat. A rare-book collector replaces pennies stolen from Jean Harlow’s square in the Hollywood Walk of Fame—and discovers a literary mystery with supernatural consequences. In a tale of time travel between 2015 and 1975, a tragedy sparked by an angel falling onto a pizza shop is reenacted—and the event is barely, but fatally, altered.

adventuresofmarydarling.callout: Finalist for the British Science Fiction Award
adventuresofmarydarling.description_text:
In this witty, subversive, and adventurous romp combining Peter Pan and Sherlock Holmes, a daring mother is the populist hero the Victorian Era never knew it needed.

When the Darling children vanish from their beds, their mother Mary knows exactly who took them. She also knows nobody in her proper, orderly London life will believe her that magic is afoot. Not even the great Sherlock Holmes.

Unfortunately, Sherlock's prime suspect is Mary herself. To save her family, and avoid being locked away in an asylum for hysterical women, Mary must escape Holmes and England.

Mary returns to her less-than-ladylike ways and gathers her allies: Ruby, a Malagasy woman from an island that is not really run by pirates; Sam, whose village was destroyed by contact with Western civilization, Captain Hook, and the crew of the Jolly Roger; and Mary's faithful dog and nursemaid, Nana.

beyondtherift.callout: Winner of the Hugo Award and the Shirley Jackson Award
beyondtherift.description_text:
Skillfully combining complex science with finely executed prose, these edgy, award-winning tales explore the always-shifting border between the known and the alien.

The beauty and peril of technology and the passion and penalties of conviction merge in stories that are by turns dark, satiric, bold, and introspective. A seemingly humanized monster from John Carpenter’s The Thing reveals the true villains in an Antarctic showdown. An artificial intelligence shields a biologically-enhanced prodigy from her overwhelmed parents. A deep-sea diver discovers that her true nature lies not within the confines of her mission but in the depths of her psyche. A court psychologist analyzes a psychotic graduate student who has learned to reprogram reality itself. A father tries to hold his broken family together in the wake of an ongoing assault by sentient rainstorms.

Gorgeously saturnine and exceptionally powerful, these collected fictions are both intensely thought-provoking and impossible to forget.

emeraldcircus.callout: Winner of the World Fantasy Award
emeraldcircus.description_text:
Where is Wendy? Leading a labor strike against the Lost Boys, of course.

A Scottish academic unearths ancient evil in a fishing village. Edgar Allan Poe’s young bride is beguiled by a most unusual bird. Dorothy, lifted from Kansas, returns as a gymnastic sophisticate. Emily Dickinson dwells in possibility and sails away in a starship made of light. Alice’s wicked nemesis has jaws and claws but really needs a sense of humor.

In Jane Yolen’s first full collection in more than ten years discover new and uncollected tales of beloved characters, literary legends, and much more. Enter the Emerald Circus and be astonished by the transformations within.

howtofractureafairytale.human_name: How to Fracture a Fairy Tale
howtofractureafairytale.callout: Winner of the Anne Izard Storytelling Award Winner
howtofractureafairytale.description_text:
2019 Anne Izard Storytelling Award Winner

Introduction by Marissa Meyer, author of Cinder

Fantasy legend Jane Yolen (The Emerald Circus, The Devil’s Arithmetic) delights with these effortlessly wide-ranging transformed fairy tales. Yolen fractures the classics to reveal their crystalline secrets, holding them to the light and presenting them entirely transformed, from a spinner of straw as a money-changer and to the big bad wolf retiring to a nursing home. Rediscover the fables you once knew, rewritten and refined for the world we now live in.

portablechildhoods.description_text:
“The kind of SF writer that comes along once in a decade…brilliant stories.”

—Cory Doctorow

“This is a woman who knows that clarity and simplicity can pierce the heart.”

—Peter Straub

“Haunting and crystalline.”

—Tangent

Portable Childhoods offers a tantalizing glimpse of what lies hidden just beyond the ordinary. Described by reviewers as timeless, delightful, chilling, and beautiful, this is short fiction at its best, emerging from a distinctive, powerful voice.

doctors_without_borders.description_text:
Payments to Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) are made via PayPal Giving Fund.

Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) is an international, independent medical humanitarian organization that delivers emergency aid to people affected by armed conflict, epidemics, natural and man-made disasters, and exclusion from health care in nearly 70 countries.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: And the Winner Is: Award Winning Fantasy, Science Fiction, & Horror from Tachyon
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Burn, Apes of Wrath, Emerald Circus, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Here at Humble, we only want to give you the best of the best, and for our more discerning readers we’ve crafted a bundle of sci-fi, fantasy, and horror ebooks from Tachyon that aren’t just great reads, but award-winning modern classics! Dive into tales of technology and terror from genre-blending master Peter Watts in his short story collection Beyond the Rift! Wartime history and B-movie schlock combine in James Morrow’s World War II kaiju extravaganza Shambling Towards Hiroshima! An utterly unique voice takes on worlds beyond our own in Ellen Klages’ haunting short story collection Portable Childhoods! There is so much more to discover in this collection of fiction from some of today’s most daring authors, so grab these books while you can at the price of your choice, and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!
from_bundle.author: Tachyon

basic_data.human_name: Upload VR Summer 2026
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Freshen up your VR collection with an epic bundle of titles perfect for any platform. Jump into the cockpit of a wide variety of aircraft in VTOL VR, a near-futuristic combat flight game built to get your heart pumping! Brave Metro Awakening, a story-driven VR adventure that blends exploration and FPS gameplay to deliver a completely immersive experience. Or get a lil’ strange with Among Us 3D, a new twist on the original game’s formula that drops you into chaos! Step out of reality and into a world of savings—plus, your purchase helps support Kiss the Ground!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 8th, 2027.
basic_data.description:
VR—The next frontier of fun. Freshen up your VR collection with an epic bundle of titles perfect for any platform. Jump into the cockpit of a wide variety of aircraft in VTOL VR, a near-futuristic combat flight game built to get your heart pumping! Brave Metro Awakening, a story-driven VR adventure that blends exploration and FPS gameplay to deliver a completely immersive experience. Or get a lil’ strange with Among Us 3D, a new twist on the original game’s formula that drops you into chaos! Step out of reality and into a world of savings—plus, your purchase helps support Kiss the Ground!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 3rd, 2027.

Pay $10 or more. Normally, the total cost for the games in this bundle is as much as $199. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $10 purchase. Pay $10 or more to access Steam keys.

Redeem on Steam. All of the games in this bundle are available on Steam for Windows. Please check out the full system requirements here prior to purchasing.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publishers and to support Kiss the Ground. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

arizonasunshineremake.description_text:
Arizona Sunshine® Remake elevates the original, award-winning game, completely rebuilt with GORE-geous VR graphics and next-gen VR combat and weapons.

When you hear a flash of a human voice on the radio, your hopes surge - there are survivors out in the blistering heat of the post-apocalyptic Grand Canyon state! Armed with little more than your motion-controlled weapons and the scarce ammo and consumables you find along the way, you need to navigate the hordes of zombies coming for your brain in your desperate search for survivors.

  • Gore-geous graphics: Immerse yourself in stunning new visuals, including high-resolution textures and realistic environmental details.
  • One complete edition including all DLZ: Arizona Sunshine® Remake includes all original DLCs and updates - Dead Man DLC, The Damned DLC, Old Mine update, Trailer Park Update and Undead Valley Update.
  • Co-op multiplayer: Join forces with a friend in co-op campaign mode or multiplayer Horde mode for up to four players. But beware, more warm brains mean more hungry undead.
  • Next-gen combat and weapons: Experience the thrill of combat as you physically wield weapons, from shotguns to machetes.
  • Relive the original story: Built in bite-sized VR chunks that together form a full narrative, the campaign allows you to jump in for a short session or stay for the complete ride.
  • Brand-new mutilation and gore system: Discover all the ways to slay a Fred through our upgraded mutilation and gore system.

Originally launched in 2016, Arizona Sunshine® garnered widespread acclaim ('the best VR shooter yet', UploadVR; 'a breath of fresh air', TechRadar) and numerous awards, such as:
  • UploadVR Award - Best VR Game of the Year (2016)
  • Dutch Game Awards - Best Virtual Reality Game (2017)
  • The Vivey Awards - Best HTC Vive FPS (2016)

metroawakening.description_text:
Metro Awakening is a story-driven first person adventure built exclusively for VR that blends atmospheric exploration, stealth and combat in the most immersive Metro experience yet.

The year is 2028

The survivors of nuclear Armageddon cling to existence in the buried subways of the Moscow Metro – civilization’s last refuge and tomb, where ghosts and spirits haunt the living in this man-made purgatory.

You are Serdar, a doctor braving the darkness, crippling radiation and deadly threats of the Metro in the search for your wife and the medication she so desperately needs. As your courage and sanity are pushed to the limit you must learn to walk the line between life and death, the spirit and the material world, and awaken the being you will become…

Features:
  • Lose yourself in a journey of spiritual awakening in this chilling, supernatural origins story from Metro creator Dmitry Glukhovsky
  • Experience Metro’s tense, heart-pounding gameplay in VR for the first time as you put on your mask, ammo and filters run low and your torchlight flickers and dies in the darkness
  • Wield a signature arsenal of hand-made weapons, don your gas mask, and venture into the depths of the Metro where desperate bandits, mutants, and worse haunt your every step

zerocaliber2remastered.description_text:
NEW CONTENT DROPPED - TOON SKINS

### THE SEQUEL ###

Your favorite all-in-one VR FPS is back - and it’s better in every way!
Zero Caliber 2 Remastered is the full-blown sequel to the original, built on everything we learned during development and shaped by community feedback.

We’ve been giving it everything we’ve got to deliver the kind of VR shooter the PCVR community actually deserves - no lazy ports, no shortcuts.

Expect intense, cinematic firefights, airstrikes, a massive arsenal to unlock, improved weapon handling, full campaign ( solo or co-op ), and head-to-head PvP .

The story picks up right where the first game left off - only louder, faster, and more explosive .

### COMMUNITY ###

Want behind-the-scenes stuff, sneak peeks, and some chaotic dev energy?
Hop into our Discord, we’re in there when we aren't working on the release build - which is rare. Come join our community anyway!

zerocalibervr.description_text:
ABOUT THIS GAME
Zero Caliber VR is a first-person tactical shooter developed by XREAL Games exclusively for premium Virtual Reality headsets.

The story brings the player to a dystopian United States in the not too distant future where physics-based interaction combined with hyper realistic weapon handling and stunning graphics will make you feel like you’re physically part of the action. Fight either alone, or with your friends throughout the whole campaign, which is fully playable in Co-Op.

Action-oriented story, gripping gunfights, realistic weapons with an on-the-fly swappable attachment system. Immersion like you’ve never felt before in a VR military shooter!

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR

REALISTIC COMBAT SYSTEM - MOVE YOUR BODY TO FIGHT AND FIND COVER

Handle, aim and reload your weapons with real-life movements! We modeled the in-game weapons based on their real-life counterparts paying extreme attention to detail. Each weapon has its unique reloading method that you have to learn and practice to fully master them.

If you fancy explosions, just grab a grenade and throw it at the enemy. After you pulled the pin of course.
Stay in the open for too long and you’re dead. Try to find cover instead, duck, crouch, sneak, peek around a corner, clear obstacles with real-life movements. Military combat isn’t all about shooting. Being aware of your surroundings, the terrain, and working together with your squadmates are all part of a successful mission. Don’t let your fellow soldiers down!

REALISTIC WEAPONS - CUSTOMIZE YOUR FAVOURITE GUN

Everyone has a unique playstyle. Is accuracy your thing? Put a laser sight on your assault rifle and take accurate shots in semi-automatic mode, or just grab a sniper rifle. Are you more of a shoot first, ask later type of person? Take a shotgun, or dual wield your machine guns in fully automatic firing mode. Be careful though, recoil can make your job really difficult! Combine your favourite gun with your favourite attachments on-the-fly to find out which variation suits you the most!

THE STORY - DIVE INTO AN ENGAGING DYSTOPIAN ADVENTURE IN THE NOT TOO DISTANT FUTURE

Water is life. Someone should’ve made that clear before humanity started poisoning Earth with microplastics. Now water is death. People are fighting for drinkable water, for survival.

The military tried their best to keep order, but inevitably they got overwhelmed. That’s when mercenaries appeared.. then entire private armies.. and then when hope started to fade away came the religious cults. The most fearsome of all is a secretive organization worshipping Tlaloc, the aztec God of rain. The “Tlalokii”, as they call themselves. Their motto? “Join us or perish”. What is even worse, they know something that can change the fate of humanity.

Be part of this action-packed, story-driven VR adventure where you fight alongside your fellow soldiers trying to keep order… or what’s left of it anyway.

STUNNING GRAPHICS

We place realism above anything else. Graphics and ambiance are crucial parts of this, that’s why we took extreme care in audio and visual design. Explorable open environment, stunning graphics, background noises, realistic weapon sound effects.

A constantly developing military VR FPS experience that will surely make you forget that you are in a video game!

vtolvr.description_text:
VTOL VR is a near-futuristic combat flight game built specifically for Virtual Reality. Pilot advanced multi-role jets, using your hands to flip switches, press buttons, and manipulate the virtual flight controls. Take on a wide array of challenges that will put your flight skills, situational awareness, and combat tactics to the test.
No extra hardware is required. If you have a VR set with tracked controllers, then you have a virtual cockpit where you can reach out and interact with the stick and throttle, flip switches, press buttons, and even pull the eject handle if things go wrong.

Immerse yourself in action packed combat missions, delicate vertical landings, aircraft carrier operations, aerial refueling and more.

Create and fly custom missions which you can share with other pilots using the built-in mission editor and map editor.

Join other pilots in online multiplayer for PVP battles or cooperative missions.

Current Features
  • AV-42C Tilt-jet VTOL/STOL/CTOL Attack/Transport vehicle
  • F/A-26 Fighter/Attack Jet
  • F-45A Stealth Multi-role STOVL Jet
  • Fully interactive cockpits via tracked controllers
  • Custom mission/campaign editor
  • Custom map editor
  • Online Multiplayer
  • Steam Workshop support for user-made missions and maps
  • Various interchangeable equipment - guns, rockets, missiles, bombs, etc.
  • Near realistic vehicle systems - heads-up display, targeting pod, multi-function displays, radar, IR flares, chaff, etc.
  • Head-mounted cueing system
  • Ejector seat
  • Realistic vehicle physics - lift, weight, thrust, drag
  • Several playable missions - "story mode" campaign, free flight, training scenarios/tutorials
  • Commandable AI wingmen
  • AI friends and foes - Tanks, artillery, surface-to-air missile launchers, ships, planes
  • Aerial refueling
  • Ground based refueling and rearmament
  • Carrier operations - catapult assisted takeoff, arrested landing
  • Radio communication system for wingmen, ATC (Windows 10 voice recognition compatible)

ancientdungeon.description_text:
Welcome to Ancient Dungeon VR . This is a fast and fun dungeon roguelite game made just for VR. Swing your sword, grab loot, and explore rooms full of traps, secrets, and monsters. The dungeons change every time you play! It’s one of the best-rated VR games out there with Overwhelmingly Positive reviews, and you can play for many hours with your friends!

Full Online Multiplayer

Team up with friends in multiplayer. Trade blows with dungeon bosses, share loot, and revive each other… or let them get caught while you grab the loot. Your choice. Multiplayer supports up to 4 players, cross-play with Quest native and soon PSVR2.

New Dungeons Every Time

No two runs are the same! Every time you play, the dungeon looks different, with new monsters and loot. You can unlock secret rooms, new floors, and cool surprises.

Real Combat. Real Movement. Real Fun.

Slash, block, throw, and dodge, all with your real hands in VR! You can even cut down plants if you’re feeling silly.

Unique Powerups, Countless Builds

Find special items called Relics that make you stronger or give you new powers. Will you become a glass cannon? A tanky swordsman? Or maybe something... cursed?

Permanent Unlocks & Upgrades

Earn permanent rewards like new weapons, floors, relics, upgrades, hard mode, and more! Every adventure helps you build power and unlock fresh challenges.

Features

  • Procedurally generated dungeons

  • Physics-based VR combat: feel every swing and throw

  • Rich roguelite progression with hundreds of combinations

  • Play online with up to 4 friends

  • Over 70 unique enemies, 11 bosses, 150+ relics

  • Walk, teleport, or even swing like a monkey!

  • Unlock new floors and mini encounters for more variety

  • Keep track of your monster kills, stats, and trophies

  • Permanent progression system via Bestiary, Item Compendiums and Lore Entries

  • Always getting new updates

  • Mods supported too!

tacticalassaultvr.description_text:
Become part of an elite special forces unit in Tactical Assault VR!

Tactical Assault VR is an intense tactical shooter where you use real-world CQB (Close Quarters Battles) tactics to stack up, breach doors and eliminate threats. Play solo or join an online co-op special forces unit in missions around the world.

Features

PvE Missions: Solo or Online Multiplayer Co-Op with Up to 8 Players on PCVR

PvP: Competitive Online Multiplayer

9 Non-Linear Asymmetrical Missions, 3 Wave Shooter Experiences, Room Randomizer & Sandbox Mode

Plan your assault. The choice is yours.

Game Mode Variety

Bomb Defusal, Hostage Rescue, Enemy Surrendering, High-Value Target (HVT) Eliminations, Mini Games, Killhouse, Hardcore Mode.

60+ Detailed Weapons and Counting

Customize your loadout with tactical gear including vests, helmets, weapons, scopes, sights, grips, and breaching equipment.

Join the Discord and Find Your Squad

thiefvr_legacyofshadow.description_text:
The City is a place of shadows, ruled by the powerful and feared by the oppressed. Its rooftops form a labyrinth above the narrow, twisting streets. The City Watch prowls relentlessly, enforcing the iron will of Baron Ulysses Northcrest, a tyrant who crushes rebellion before it can take root.

You are Magpie, a cunning thief orphaned by Northcrest’s brutality and shaped by the streets, who steals as the only means to survive. That is, until you uncover something greater: a legendary artifact holding a legacy from the past. Use immersive VR mechanics to steal, evade, and outsmart the forces controlling The City. Unravel its darkest secrets and expose a sinister conspiracy that looms over its very foundation. 


Key Features:

  • A Legendary Franchise Returns: Experience the world of Thief in VR for the first time, blending classic stealth gameplay with next-gen immersion.

  • Master the Shadows: Stick to the darkness, evade patrols, and outmaneuver enemies with real-time stealth mechanics.

  • Realistic Thieving: Pickpocket guards, pry open hidden compartments, and bypass locks with tactile VR interactions.

  • Precision & Skill: Use an array of arrows and tools to distract, disable, or eliminate threats with immersive VR archery.

  • Explore The City: Climb rooftops, sneak through back alleys, and uncover secrets in a dark, steampunk-inspired world.

  • Choose Your Approach: Every heist offers multiple paths and playstyles—sneak past guards unseen or take them down from the shadows.

amongus3d_vr.description_text:
The definitive social deduction party game in three dimensions! Among Us 3D is a party game of teamwork and betrayal. Grab your crew of 4-10 players and launch into a fully 3D version of the beloved classic.

Note: Among Us 3D: VR is NOT compatible and does not feature crossplay with the original Among Us game.

Experience the core Among Us gameplay you know and love, such as tasks, sabotages, Emergency Meetings, and venting — now in 3D!

In Classic gameplay, play as either Crewmate or Impostor.

— Crewmate Mission : Complete all tasks or eject the Impostor. Keep your eyes and ears open — someone could be lurking right around the corner. Can you and the crew survive?!

— Impostor Mission : Sabotage, deceive, and kill all Crewmates! Sneak through vents, craft the perfect lie, frame the innocent, and survive at any means necessary.

Enjoy classic Crewmate tasks, reimagined with innovative and immersive first-person controls. Beware the Impostor while you try your hand at all new tasks! Customize your gameplay, comfort, and safety settings to build the best experience possible.

Switch things up with Roles, Tag Mode, and Custom Lobbies!

Add even more Roles into the mix with fan-favorites like the vent-using Engineer from the original Among Us or some AU3D exclusives, such as the vengeful Wraith or justice-seeking Vigilante!

In Tag Mode, it’s Infected versus Crewmates. The Infectedtry to catch and infect all Crewmates to expand their ranks before the Crewmates can finish a set number of tasks.

Lobby up and connect with other Crewmates — including Among Us 3D PC players! — with native crossplay. Create custom lobbies for you and your closest pals with personalized gameplay, comfort, and moderation settings.

Note: Among Us 3D: VR is NOT compatible and does not feature crossplay with the original Among Us game.Fashion your Crewmate with an endless number of color, hat, glove, and skin combinations. Expand your wardrobe even more with Stardust. Purchase this in-game currency* to spend on additional cosmetics and let your true style shine!

Note : Stardust is not compatible with and cannot be converted to or from currencies in the original Among Us game.

Team up with or betray your friends using your preferred method of communication:

— Yap away with native, proximity voice chat.
— Setup private lobbies with your friends without needing external chatting apps.

— Not a talker? Use intuitive and efficient Quick Text Chat options to stay communicative.

— Express yourself through your hands with the all-new Gesture system.

kisstheground.description_text:
Donations to support Kiss the Ground are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
Kiss the Ground is a nonprofit committed to inspiring participation in global regeneration, beginning with soil. We create educational curriculum, campaigns, and media to raise awareness and empower individuals to purchase food that supports healthy soils and a balanced climate. KTG also works with farmers, educators, NGOs, scientists, students, and policymakers to advocate for regenerative agriculture, raise funds to train farmers, and help brands and businesses to invest in healthy soils.

Donations to support Kiss the Ground are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
Kiss the Ground is a nonprofit committed to inspiring participation in global regeneration, beginning with soil. We create educational curriculum, campaigns, and media to raise awareness and empower individuals to purchase food that supports healthy soils and a balanced climate. KTG also works with farmers, educators, NGOs, scientists, students, and policymakers to advocate for regenerative agriculture, raise funds to train farmers, and help brands and businesses to invest in healthy soils.

from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get VTOL VR, Among Us 3D: VR, Zero Caliber VR, Metro Awakening, Arizona Sunshine® Remake, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Freshen up your VR collection with an epic bundle of titles perfect for any platform. Jump into the cockpit of a wide variety of aircraft in VTOL VR, a near-futuristic combat flight game built to get your heart pumping! Brave Metro Awakening, a story-driven VR adventure that blends exploration and FPS gameplay to deliver a completely immersive experience. Or get a lil’ strange with Among Us 3D, a new twist on the original game’s formula that drops you into chaos! Step out of reality and into a world of savings—plus, your purchase helps support Kiss the Ground!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 8th, 2027.

basic_data.human_name: Premium Sci-Fi Design Training Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Curious about game design? Then you need the Premium Sci-Fi Design Training Bundle by Learn Squared! Go from game lover to developer when you study under the best—learn how to bring your artistic side into the digital world with Concepting in ZBrush, jump into your own vessel of the stars with Starship Design, create original protagonists with Futuristic Character Design, and more. Get the expert instruction and knowledge you seek, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 7th, 2027.
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Master modern staples of game development
basic_data.description:
Master modern staples of game development. Curious about game design? Then you need the Premium Sci-Fi Design Training Bundle by Learn Squared! Go from game lover to developer when you study under the best—learn how to bring your artistic side into the digital world with Concepting in ZBrush, jump into your own vessel of the stars with Starship Design, create original protagonists with Futuristic Character Design, and more. Get the expert instruction and knowledge you seek, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $1,153. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase.

Redeem your keys. You can redeem the content of this bundle in Learn Squared website.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developers and to support Girls Who Code. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

industrialdesignfoundations.description_text: Design real-world products with Tim Zarki as you learn industrial design fundamentals and Fusion 360 workflows. Move from thoughtful sketches to polished forms and finish with photoreal Keyshot renders that showcase your craftsmanship.

rethinkingweapondesign.description_text: Reimagine weapon designs with confidence as Luis Carrasco guides you through creative workflows that do not require advanced drawing or 3D skills. Unlock your imagination, elevate your process, and design bold, inventive weapons at any level.

conceptarchitecture.description_text: Explore a more artistic style of architectural concept design with Maxim Zhestkov. Learn his Cinema 4D, Arnold, and Photoshop techniques to craft striking images, including your own immersive 360° render.

hardsurfacemodeling.description_text: Design functional, production-ready concepts in Fusion 360 with Kirill Chepizhko. Learn a streamlined 3D workflow that brings purpose to your ideas and equips you with the techniques needed to land your first gig.

vehicleconceptart.description_text: Boost your concept art workflow with Pablo Dominguez as you generate simple 3D assets, build dynamic compositions, and paint over them to create detailed, cinematic artwork for your projects or portfolio.

designingfuturisticvisuals.description_text: Create striking futuristic visuals with Toros Kose as you design assets, build compelling styleframes, and add animation for extra impact. This Director’s Cut edition delivers an expanded, updated look at his full professional workflow.

armadaconceptart.description_text: Experience a streamlined, production-level concept art workflow with Aaron Limonick. Using 3D-Coat, Blender, Octane and Photoshop, you’ll go from early ship sculpt to final cinematic render with clarity, efficiency and creative power.

cinematicconceptdesign.description_text: Create stunning works of art by implementing the powerful language of film. Follow along as concept artist John Sweeney teaches you to create a cinematic image from start to finish. Covering everything from film analysis, to photoshoots, to 2D/3D workflows, this course should prove invaluable for both beginners and experts alike.

uianddatadesignforfilm.human_name: UI and Data Design for Film
uianddatadesignforfilm.description_text: From thumbnail sketch to final render, visionary designer Ash Thorp will show you how to create production-ready UI and data elements for Hollywood films.

conceptinginzbrush.description_text: Master ZBrush without the overwhelm as Alex Figini guides you through his full concepting workflow. Learn core principles, advanced sculpting, and how to build complex characters and props using ZBrush, Marvelous Designer, and Keyshot.

futuristiccharacterdesign.description_text: Learn Maciej Kuciara’s full futuristic character design workflow from loose sketches to polished renders. Build speed, consistency, and clear design thinking as you tackle creative challenges alongside his professional process.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

fusionbasics.description_text: Learn to use Autodesk Fusion with simple hands-on training. Rather than asking you to watch and memorize, this beginner-focused course guides you through core tools and workflows by having you create something new in each lesson.

dynamicconceptarti.description_text: Unlock new creative possibilities with Louis Laurent’s fluid mix of 2D and 3D techniques. Learn to embrace happy accidents and build unique, expressive artworks with a process that keeps experimentation at the center.

hardsurfacedesign.description_text: Build hard-surface props of any size with Lars Sowig as he takes you through blocking, modeling, texturing, and rendering. Learn a full production workflow, right down to custom decals, and create props ready for films, games, and beyond.

starshipdesign.description_text: Design cinematic spacecraft as you explore ideation, modeling, texturing, and presentation workflows. Create scientifically grounded ships and polished keyframes using Blender, Photoshop, and Octane.

masteringfilmui.description_text: Learn to design and animate incredible, film-ready UI for your next project with Kris Brady's comprehensive new course. Master the art of creating stunning interfaces that seamlessly integrate into any film project, and take your design skills to the next level.

Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

imperialcachepack_dungeondefendersii.callout: A regal, mid-premium pack that gives your heroes cosmetics fit for royalty alongside a highly practical progression baseline
imperialcachepack_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Step into the realm of royalty with the Imperial Cache Pack for Dungeon Defenders II! This regal pack bestows upon your heroes cosmetic finery fit for kings and queens, along with a treasury of gems and Shards that will let you command respect and power across Etheria!

This pack may only be purchased once per account. To redeem the items contained in the pack, visit and interact with the Mailbox in the Heroes Marketplace or Private Tavern.

This pack contains:

4,800 Gems to purchase Heroes, Flair, Costumes, and more. (4,000 + 800 Extra Gems!)

5 Mythical Defender Packs to gain any number of cosmetic rewards to look your best!

Two Shard Packs from Campaign and every level of Chaos (22 total!) to equip unique bonuses to your heroes and defenses.

Legendary Autumeow Pet to wreck your enemies with natural power.

burningsoulspack_dungeondefendersii.callout: A spooky, long-standing Halloween celebration package tailored entirely around throwing in-game parties with a classic skeleton aesthetic.
burningsoulspack_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Celebrate Halloween with our new Burning Souls Pack. Set up some fireworks, popcorn, and put on some Halloween masks to throw your own in-game party! Pick up the Burning Souls Pack now:

- 4 Burning Soul skins for the Original Heroes (Squire, Huntress, Apprentice, Monk)
- 50 Consumable Masks to spice up the party
- 10 Fireworks Launchers
- 10 Popcorn Machines to give you and your party some sweet combat buffs!

500gembundle_dungeondefendersii.description_text: A respectable pouch of premium gems. Perfect for funding your next inventory tab or upgrading your fashion.

bundleofthebeast_dungeondefendersii.callout: A legacy, corruption-themed aesthetic set designed purely to give your characters a menacing, dark overlord appearance.
bundleofthebeast_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Dungeon Defenders II - Bundle of the Beast

Embrace the Demon Lord with a set of accessories that can be equipped on any hero and four unique helmets for the original four heroes! This bundle contains:

The Hellion’s Mask, Wings, Tail and Fire Ember Trail accessories that can be equipped on any hero!

The Purrnicorn Mask helmet for the Huntress.

The Bag ‘O’ Boogey helmet for the Monk.

The Pumpkin Head Folly helmet for the Apprentice.

The Dread Knight Casque helmet for the Squire.

2,000,000 Gold for a quick boost in leveling your loot.

treasuretrovepack_dungeondefendersii.callout: A lower-mid tier progression choice built as a collector's dream to get a fast foothold into late-game challenges.
treasuretrovepack_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Embark on an epic journey with the Treasure Trove Pack for Dungeon Defenders II! This pack is a collector’s dream, brimming with cosmetic treasures that will dazzle your allies and intimidate your foes. Unearth a wealth of Shards that promise to fortify your defenses and amplify your offense, as well as a chest full of gems to unlock even more cosmetic enhancements!

This pack may only be purchased once per account. To redeem the items contained in the pack, visit and interact with the Mailbox in the Heroes Marketplace or Private Tavern.

This pack contains:

2,850 Gems to purchase Heroes, Flair, Costumes, and more. (2,500 + 350 Extra Gems!)

2 Mythical Defender Packs to gain any number of cosmetic rewards to look your best!

One Shard Pack from Campaign and every level of Chaos (11 total!) to equip unique bonuses to your heroes and defenses.

Legendary Terror Dragolich Pet to strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

goldenheadlesshorsemanpet_dungeondefende.callout: A Humble Bundle Exclusive Pet; a $20 in-game value!
goldenheadlesshorsemanpet_dungeondefende.description_text: He may have lost his head, but he definitely kept his bling. A terrifyingly shiny companion to spook the old one's hoards.

etherealtrovepack_dungeondefendersii.callout: A hefty, arcane-themed progression injection meant to give mid-to-high level players a major mystical boost.
etherealtrovepack_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Unlock the mysteries of the arcane with the Ethereal Trove Pack for Dungeon Defenders II! This pack is a treasure chest of otherworldly delights that shimmer with an ethereal glow, and a cornucopia of gems and Shards to unlock ultimate mystical powers!

This pack may only be purchased once per account. To redeem the items contained in the pack, visit and interact with the Mailbox in the Heroes Marketplace or Private Tavern.

This pack contains:

8100 Gems to purchase Heroes, Flair, Costumes, and more. (6,500 + 1,600 Extra Gems!)

5 Mythical Defender Packs to gain any number of cosmetic rewards to look your best!

Two Shard Packs from Campaign and every level of Chaos (22 total!) to equip unique bonuses to your heroes and defenses.

Legendary Katkarot Pet to achieve ultimate levels of power!

celestialvaultpack_dungeondefendersii.callout: The ultimate, top-tier luxury supporter pack available on the storefront.
celestialvaultpack_dungeondefendersii.description_text:
Elevate your Dungeon Defenders II experience to the stars with the Celestial Vault Pack! By acquiring this pack, you’ll not only show your support for the game but also gain our cosmic gratitude and celestial commendation.

This pack may only be purchased once per account. To redeem the items contained in the pack, visit and interact with the Mailbox in the Heroes Marketplace or Private Tavern.

This pack contains:

13000 Gems to purchase Heroes, Flair, Costumes, and more. (10,000 + 3,000 Extra Gems!)

10 Mythical Defender Packs to gain any number of cosmetic rewards to look your best!

Three Shard Packs from Campaign and every level of Chaos (33 total!) to equip unique bonuses to your heroes and defenses.

Legendary Katkarot Pet to achieve ultimate levels of power!

Legendary Autumeow Pet to wreck your enemies with natural power.

adventurersarsenalpack_dungeondefendersi.description_text:
Prepare for the ultimate expedition with the Adventurer’s Arsenal Pack for Dungeon Defenders II! This comprehensive pack comes with gems that allow you to buy cosmetic enhancements to adorn your heroes with, a selection of strategic Shards to bolster your defenses, and the practical additions of an extra bag and an expanded bank vault for all of your storage needs.

To redeem the items contained in the pack, visit and interact with the Mailbox in the Heroes Marketplace or Private Tavern.

This pack contains:

1,650 Gems to purchase Heroes, Flairs, Costumes, and more. (1,500 + 150 Extra Gems!)

1 Inventory Bag to carry more loot (up to a max of 8 bags).

1 Bank Vault to store more items in town (up to a max of 12 vaults).

Five Campaign Shard Packs to equip unique bonuses to your heroes and defenses.

basic_data.human_name: Hip Hop, Lofi & Trap Mega Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: The Hip Hop, Lofi & Trap Mega Bundle brings the energy with audio assets that keep the party going! Perfect for audio engineers of all levels, this bundle offers a little of everything from a wide variety of genres. Get the assets you need to achieve the perfect beat with Artifacts Boom Bap Samples, Lofi Hip Hop Breeze, and more! A strong bassline is like a healthy heartbeat—everyone needs one—pay what you want for the ultimate Hip Hop, Lofi, and Trap music bundle and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!
basic_data.description:
Never miss a beat drop. The Hip Hop, Lofi & Trap Mega Bundle brings the energy with audio assets that keep the party going! Perfect for audio engineers of all levels, this bundle offers a little of everything from a wide variety of genres. Get the assets you need to achieve the perfect beat with Artifacts Boom Bap Samples, Lofi Hip Hop Breeze, and more! A strong bassline is like a healthy heartbeat—everyone needs one—pay what you want for the ultimate Hip Hop, Lofi, and Trap music bundle and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Pay $3 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $1,622. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $3 purchase. Pay $3 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. Redeem your keys at waproduction.com

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support WWF. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

worldwildlifefund.description_text:
Payments to the World Wildlife Fund are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

WWF is one of the world’s largest and most experienced independent conservation organizations, with over 5 million supporters and a global network active in more than 100 countries.

WWF’s mission is to stop the degradation of the planet’s natural environment and to build a future in which humans live in harmony with nature, by conserving the world’s biological diversity, ensuring that the use of renewable natural resources is sustainable, and promoting the reduction of pollution and wasteful consumption.

The WWF name and logo are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The WWF name and logo is a registered trademark owned by WWF. For more information about WWF, please visit www.wwf.org

worldwildlifefund.description_text:
Payments to the World Wildlife Fund are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

WWF is one of the world’s largest and most experienced independent conservation organizations, with over 5 million supporters and a global network active in more than 100 countries.

WWF’s mission is to stop the degradation of the planet’s natural environment and to build a future in which humans live in harmony with nature, by conserving the world’s biological diversity, ensuring that the use of renewable natural resources is sustainable, and promoting the reduction of pollution and wasteful consumption.

The WWF name and logo are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The WWF name and logo is a registered trademark owned by WWF. For more information about WWF, please visit www.wwf.org

steampunkzeppelinstation-victorianairshi.description_text:
*Professional License redeeming from Fab Marketplace!

Step into a grand, awe-inspiring era of aerial transit with this highly detailed Steampunk Zeppelin Station Victorian Airship Terminal environment.

This pack is a seamless fusion of ornate Victorian brass, weathered wood, and powerful, steam-driven machinery. Perfect for creating alternate history narratives, fantasy-adventure games, or immersive cinematic experiences.

Highlights Include:

- Modular Station Architecture: Intricately detailed arched copper and weathered wood structural elements, detailed wall panels, multi-level platforms, boarding walkways, and grand terminal interior walls, allowing for flexible custom layouts.

- Detailed Steampunk Automatons: Features high-detail, steam-powered humanoid robots with glowing optical sensors, serving as ticket clerks and cargo handlers, bringing life to the terminal.

- Baggage & Cargo System: A range of specific props, including a unique, detailed baggage cart (a custom-designed metal and wood wheeled vehicle) and multiple vintage leather trunks and suitcases of various shapes and sizes.

- Departure/Arrival Board & Ticket Booth: A massive, elaborate, and functional-looking departure board with hand-rendered text and mechanical clockwork details, situated above a richly decorated wooden ticket booth.

- Industrial and Steampunk Machinery: A complex network of exposed gears (including massive, moving floor gears), pressure gauges, intricate copper and steel piping, heavy valves, and iron railings.

- Docking Infrastructure: Elements of massive zeppelin structures (partial views of the gas envelopes) alongside mooring masts, cranes, and heavy-duty docking platforms with mechanical interfaces.

- Atmospheric FX and Textures: Volumetric god rays from distant windows, rich volumetric steam/smoke effects, glowing gaslight textures, soot and oil stain decals, vintage travel posters, and worn surface textures (wood, copper, leather).

- Optimized for Performance: Pre-configured for high-quality real-time rendering in Unreal Engine 5 with Nanite and Lumen, maintaining excellent visual fidelity at high frame rates (70+ FPS target on mid-to-high-end hardware).

make_a_wish.description_text:
Donations to support Make-A-Wish are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Make-A-Wish® creates life-changing wishes for children with critical illnesses. We seek to bring every eligible child's wish to life because a wish is an integral part of a child's treatment journey. Research shows children who have wishes granted can build the physical and emotional strength they need to fight their illness. Headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, Make-A-Wish is the world’s leading children’s wish-granting organization, serving children in more than 50 countries worldwide. Together, generous donors, supporters, staff and more than 40,000 volunteers, grant a wish every 17 minutes, on average, somewhere in the world. Since 1980, Make-A-Wish has granted nearly 450,000 wishes to children; more than 30,000 last year alone. For more information about Make-A-Wish International, visit worldwish.org and for more information about Make-A-Wish America, visit wish.org.
