You’ll also find core books from classic roleplaying franchises like Return to Dark Tower and original storylines like Household and Visigoths vs. Mall Goths! Assemble your friends, grab a set of dice, and pick from over 50 TTRPG books to plan your next one-night adventure or neverending campaign. Grab this bundle now for the price of your choosing, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25, 2027.
basic_data.description:
Main character energy. Become the main character of your favorite novel, film series, or game with this giant bundle of tabletop roleplaying books! This TTRPG library features core rulebooks and adventures set in tons of different franchises, from Doctor Who and Warhammer to Cthulhu, Transformers, and even My Little Pony! Basically, if you’re a fan of something, it’s probably in here. You’ll also find core books from classic roleplaying franchises like Return to Dark Tower and original storylines like Household and Visigoths vs. Mall Goths! Assemble your friends, grab a set of dice, and pick from over 50 TTRPG books to plan your next one-night adventure or neverending campaign. Grab this bundle now for the price of your choosing, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase!

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $1,243. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. The content of this bundle is redeemable through DTRPG and some PDF files. 

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support Tabletop Gaymers. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

sleepaway.description_text: In Sleepaway, you play as a camp counselor at a not-so-ordinary summer camp besieged by a Strange and ominous cryptid. Isolated from civilization, this summer camp is a beacon of safety, a refuge for misfit kids defined by their marginalization.

fabulaultimattjrpg.description_text:
This is your world, this is your story.

Make a choice and fight for what you believe in.

household.description_text: Household is a Role-Playing Game filled with adventure, intrigues, and social interactions set in a large abandoned House. It takes place in a world that resembles the first years of our XIX century, in which each room constitutes a proper nation you can explore. Players of Household take on the role of littlings, little beings of the Little Folk from European folklore.

shiftroleplayinggame.description_text: SHIFT is a fast-paced, highly customizable tabletop roleplaying game specially designed to bring your worlds to life. The SHIFT RPG Core Rulebook contains the core rules of the game, a toolkit for building your own settings, and a selection of ready-to-play mini-settings (called World Sparks) to get you telling fun stories right away.

mementomori.description_text: Memento Mori is a Role-Playing Game in which Players come together to recreate the adventures of a group of Drifters. Drifters are people sick with the plague who, despite their condition and the terrible reality of 14th century Europe, are determined to fulfill their Dream.

tabletopgaymers.description_text:
Donations to support TABLETOP GAYMERS are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Tabletop Gaymers Inc is a nonprofit organization whose mission is championing the visibility and inclusion of the lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer/questioning, intersex, asexual, and others (LGBTQIA+) community through tabletop gaming. We organize events, educational panels, information booths, and distribute pride swag at gaming conventions like Gen Con, Origins, and PAX Unplugged.

ifiwerealichman.human_name: If I Were a Lich, Man
ifiwerealichman.description_text: If I Were a Lich, Man is a trilogy of funny Jewish roleplaying games about creative resistance against authoritarianism. The villains in the stories of our oppressors become the heroes in our play. Written and illustrated by a team of avant-garde Jewish designers.

pirateborg_downamongthedead.human_name: PIRATE BORG: Down Among the Dead
pirateborg_downamongthedead.description_text: A 148-page terrible expansion that's jam-packed with three new adventures, modular rulesets, and location generators! Includes full-length adventures: Lost to the Locker, Venom in the Veins, and Into The Maelstrom.

pirateborg_buriedinthebahamas.human_name: PIRATE BORG: Buried in the Bahamas
pirateborg_buriedinthebahamas.description_text: Explore three islands, cross swords with undead skeletons, and search for treasure in the Cave of Seven Skulls! Buried in the Bahamas is an introductory adventure for Pirate Borg and The Dark Caribbean campaign setting. It was designed with first-time players and new gamemasters in mind.

urbanshadows_secondedition.description_text: Urban Shadows is an urban fantasy tabletop roleplaying game in which mortals and monsters vie for control of a modern-day city in a political battleground layered just under the reality we think we know. Vampires, faeries, hunters, and wizards fight to carve out a piece of the streets and skyscrapers, ready to make deals with all those who have something to offer.

developers.developer-name: Mark Diaz Truman, Kate Bullock, Elizabeth Chaipraditkul, Brendan G. Conway, Sarah Doom, Reyna M., Andrew Medeiros, and Helena Real

fantasyage_secondedition.description_text: Leap into sword & sorcery RPG adventures with the Fantasy AGE Core Rulebook! Powered by the popular Adventure Game Engine, Fantasy AGE 2nd Edition is easy to learn, fun to play, and welcoming to new roleplayers.

developers.developer-name: Crystal Frasier, Steve Kenson, Chris Pramas, Malcolm Sheppard, Owen K.C. Stephens

piaga1348.description_text:
From history books we have learned that during the 14th century, a devastating epidemic killed almost one-third of Europe’s population.

But the truth is quite different. 

In 1348 Europe everyone died twice: the first by the black plague, the second by the merciful blade of a member of the mysterious warrior company known as the Ordo Mortis.

Yes, in this particular 1348, the world is infested by Revenants and, for some unfathomable reason, you brandish the sword of justice. Will you be able to use it wisely?  In Piaga 1348, you play the role of Soldiers of the Ordo Mortis, an undercover army fighting a secret war to eradicate the Revenant Plague (a name lost to history) and its grim consequences. 

Piaga 1348 is a historic fantasy Role-playing Game for 3-5 players that transports you in a Grotesque, Dramatic and Sinister version of the Middle Ages. It has few rules and requires no preparation, with each session unfolding chorally.

In this book you’ll find:

  • All the rules necessary to create your own Soldier of the Ordo Mortis or take the seat of the Ludi Magister.
  • 12 creepy Scenarios ready to play, to dive deep in this 1348 scourged by the plague.
  • A selection of historical essays, to give you the tools to bring to your table the grim reality of the 14th century with chilling historical accuracy.

Mature Advisory: graphic and written content of a mature nature, including violence, sexual themes, and strong language. Reader discretion is advised

Want to take your first steps right away in the grim, revenant-infested Middle Ages of Piaga 1348? Here’s the Quickdeath, ready for you to download for free, featuring a complete introductory ready to play scenario, Villa Boccaccio, and pre-made character sheets for 5 Soldiers.

doctorwho_theroleplayinggamesecondeditio.human_name: Doctor Who: The Roleplaying Game Second Edition
doctorwho_theroleplayinggamesecondeditio.description_text: The award-winning Doctor Who: The Roleplaying Game has regenerated into a new Second Edition that is faster, easier, and even more exciting. This book presents all the rules and background you need to voyage across space and time with the Doctor, or as new characters experiencing brand new epic adventures.

developers.developer-name: David F. Chapman, Will Brooks, Zak Dale-Clutterbuck, Eleanor Hingley, Andrew Peregrine, John Sewell, Chris Spivey

visigothsvsmallgoths.description_text: Lucian Kahn's Visigoths vs. Mall Goths is a tabletop roleplaying game and dating sim about the conflicts and romances among the warriors who sacked ancient Rome and 20th century spooky teens, set in a suburban Los Angeles shopping mall during 1996.

innominecorerules.description_text: In Nomine is a modern roleplaying game in which the players take the part of celestial beings - angels and demons - as they struggle for control of humanity and themselves. The celestials, powerful though they may be, are merely pawns in a much larger game being played by their Superiors, the Archangels and Demon Princes.

coriolis_thegreatdarkcorerulebook.human_name: Coriolis: The Great Dark Core Rulebook
coriolis_thegreatdarkcorerulebook.description_text: Inspired by 19th century expeditions, deep sea diving and pulp archaeology, Coriolis: The Great Dark is a roleplaying game about exploration and intrigue. Join dangerous expeditions, navigate the Byzantine schemes of Ship City, and hunt for the keys that unlock the mystery of this Lost Horizon.

developers.developer-name: Kosta Kostulas, Nils Karlén, Martin Grip

cartel.description_text: Take on the role of someone tied to the Sinaloa Cartel in Durango, Mexico, trying to stay alive in a dangerous game of drugs, money, and power. Cartel is a Mexican narcofiction tabletop roleplaying game that makes use of the same rules-light engine as Apocalypse World, Monsterhearts, and Urban Shadows.

wonderhome.description_text: Wanderhome is a pastoral fantasy roleplaying game about traveling animal-folk, the world they inhabit, and the way the seasons change. It is a game filled with grassy fields, mossy shrines, herds of chubby bumblebees, opossums in sundresses, salamanders with suspenders, starry night skies, and the most beautiful sunsets you can imagine.

businesswizardsversion20.description_text: Play as middle management wizards stuck in pointless corporate jobs. In this shared-GM game, you will conduct the mysterious SWOT analysis ritual, ideate on new spells, and build out your adventurer's resume! Wrap it all up with a 360-degree review.

ashenstars.description_text: In this sci-fi GUMSHOE game, you play freelance troubleshooters and law enforcers, operating in a remote sector of space. Amid the ashes of a devastating galactic war, you’ll solve mysteries, fix thorny problems, and explore strange corners of space.

strange.description_text: The Strange is a roleplaying game set in the modern day with characters who have special abilities to travel to pocket dimensions created from Earth's own myths, legends, and fiction.

developers.developer-name: Bruce R. Cordell and Monte Cook

terrortargetgemini.description_text:
A RUN & GUN TABLETOP ROLEPLAYING GAME

In the Maju, life is shorter than a dynamite fuse!

DESIGNED, WRITTEN, AND ILLUSTRATED BY LUCA NEGRI, Terror Target Gemini is a OSR tabletop roleplaying game where you play Runners, professional adventurers hired for dangerous tasks (deliveries, arrests, rescue missions, assassinations) in the savage lands known as the Maju. One player takes the role of the Narrator, defining and describing interesting locations, portraying their inhabitants, running combat and narrating how the world changes as you play.

Playing requires a set of polyhedral dice (including d6 d8, d10, d12, d20).

Inspired by the likes of SandLand, The Good the Bad and the Weird, Mad Max, Progear, Lupin III, Trigun, Tekkon Kinkreet, and Linda3, TERROR TARGET GEMINI is a hyper-violent, anachronistic western adventure, living out a colorful, zany fantasy atmosphere with action manga overtones populated by demonic gunslingers and martial arts witches.

Runners take on all manner of dangerous jobs, and their License documents their ability to carry them out.

Successful jobs lead to Wèn, and Wèn lead to Stars. Stars mean Runners can acquire more skills, influence, and reputation.

Every self-respecting Runner aims to stock up on cash and scale the ranks by gaining Stars. That’s only possible when working as a team: lone wolves rarely succeed, especially on tougher missions.

Typical Runner work includes delivering or picking up rare objects, investigating mysteries, hunting monsters… Wanted criminals also have large bounties on their heads, and the right collector will pay a fortune for reclaimed treasures.

TERROR TARGET GEMINI includes rules for creating your own runners (or starting with pregenerated characters!), arming them and throwing them into the fray against a whole repertoire of wanted men, background on the Maju and an in-depth guide to the city of Djar-Zagazig, as well as two complete adventures (Don't Look Back and The Wolves of Alkharab) and plenty of guidance for making your encounters in the hex maps ever more imaginative.

breach.description_text:
A retro SCIENCE FICTION

ROLEPLAYING GAME

In 1943, the Ministry of Culture and Science of the Enlightened Confederacy initiated an experiment to test Mobius-Higgs’ theory of Space-Time Flows. However, something went terribly wrong: an explosion occurred in one of the laboratory’s particle accelerators, creating a portal between our world and countless other dimensions known as the Breach.

Following this experiment, recorded in the annals as the Collision, the Ministry of Culture and Science building was isolated, and all employees were evacuated and taken to the underground bomb shelter called the Bastion, without being able to communicate with the outside world.

Under the supervision of the Heralds, the members of the Ministry reorganized life within the Bastion and established the R.A.C.E. Protocol (Research, Analyze, Collect, and Eradicate) to deploy teams of specialized scientists, known as watchers, into the uncharted realms beyond the Breach. Their activity exists and is organized around a single purpose – to fulfill the most recent directive from the Prime of State: “Travel through the infinite worlds, to glorify the Enlightened Confederacy”.

heckin_gooddoggos.description_text: Heckin’ Good Doggos is an all-ages roleplaying game of “Dogs doin' Dog Stuff." Create a four-legged friend and pal around the neighborhood with the other doggos to investigate small-stakes mysteries like “who keeps leaving boxes at my house?” and “where do all the squirrels go at night?”

developers.developer-name: JD Kennedy with Alison Cybe, Justin Giza, Michele Lee, and Steven Wu

cthulhuawakens.description_text: Cthulhu Awakens brings cosmic horror and the Cthulhu Mythos to Green Ronin’s popular AGE System. This complete RPG reimagines and expands the Mythos beyond the biases of the original stories, creating a setting designed specifically for roleplaying eldritch adventures.

developers.developer-name: Sharang Biswas, Elizabeth Chaipraditkul, David Castro, Hiromi Cota, Sian Ingham, Steve Kenson, Khaldoun Khelil, Danielle Lauzon, Ian Lemke, Monte Lin, Oz Mills, Jack Norris, Malcolm Sheppard

mylittleponyroleplayinggame.description_text: In the My Little Pony Roleplaying Game, players craft their own custom pony character to use in their storytelling game of friendship and magic, as they combat various Threats and other problems in Equestria and beyond throughout their adventures, led by their Game Master.

pirateborg_starterset.description_text: The PIRATE BORG Starter Set includes everything you need for a group of 2-7 people to play the Worst Pirate RPG Ever Made™! Contains PDFs of the Player’s Guidebook, a new adventure, Trapped in the Tropics, and all the maps, handouts, tiles, and tokens in digital form.

bladerunnerrpgcorerulebook.callout: Best Layout and Design (Gold), Best Cartography (Gold)
bladerunnerrpgcorerulebook.description_text: The official BLADE RUNNER RPG will propel players into the streets of Los Angeles as Blade Runners with unique specialties, personalities – and memories. The core game and its line of expansions will push the boundaries of investigative gameplay in tabletop RPGs, giving players a range of tools to solve an array of cases far beyond retiring Replicants.

oneringtmcorerules.description_text: Enter the world of Middle-earth with The One Ring™, the official tabletop roleplaying game based on the works of J.R.R. Tolkien. Designed specifically to evoke the atmosphere of The Hobbit™ and The Lord of the Rings™, the game contains rules for creating heroes and sending them off on adventures in a land threatened by the growing Shadow.

developers.developer-name: Francesco Nepitello, Marco Maggi, Michele Garbuggio, James Michael Spahn, Jason Durall

returntodarktowerfantasyroleplaying.human_name: Return to Dark Tower Fantasy Roleplaying
returntodarktowerfantasyroleplaying.description_text: Fight the Adversary to save the Four Kingdoms! Return to Dark Tower Fantasy Roleplaying is an officially licensed, complete fantasy RPG based on the hit board game RETURN TO DARK TOWER by Restoration Games, and inspired by the original Dark Tower board game from the 1980s.

startrekadventures_secondedition.description_text:
SPACE, THE FINAL FRONTIER…

“There’s no such thing as the unknown–only things temporarily hidden, temporarily not understood.” 

- Captain James T. Kirk

The

Star Trek Adventures

roleplaying game takes you to the final frontier! 

 

From the 21st through to the 32nd century, join Starfleet, the Klingon Empire, the Romulan Star Empire, and countless other civilizations, and journey across the

Star Trek

universe with your crew. Explore strange new worlds, encounter fantastical alien life-forms, and engage in dramatic adventures in a detailed and immersive Galaxy.

 

Tell your stories and unravel the mysteries of the unknown!

 

The 376-page, full-color,

Star Trek Adventures Second Edition Core Rulebook

PDF contains:

 

  • A complete and updated version of the 2d20 System rules, designed for an authentic

    Star Trek

    experience.

  • An extensive primer on

    Star Trek

    , including details on a range of societies, worlds, species, and the scientific concepts that underpin this timeless universe.

  • 14 player character species to choose from, including Andorian, Cardassian, Klingon, Orion, and Vulcan.

  • Guidelines for both novice and experienced gamemasters, offering advice on challenging your players with dramatic and thoughtful gameplay, unique to the

    Star Trek

    universe.

  • Game statistics and graphics for 15 playable starship classes, including Federation, Klingon, and Romulan vessels.

  • Dozens of non-player characters, starships, and creatures to populate your missions, including Federation, Klingon, Cardassian, and Dominion.

  • Historical excerpts, personal logs, and intercepted communications provide fresh perspectives and insights from across the Galaxy.

  • Created by an expert

    Star Trek

    development team, including a diverse mix of experienced and new artists, designers, editors, and writers.

 

These are the voyages of your ship, your crew. Live it together.

TM & © 2024 CBS Studios Inc. © 2024 Paramount Pictures Corp. STAR TREK and related marks and logos are trademarks of CBS Studios Inc. All Rights Reserved.

developers.developer-name: Mike “O’dah ziibing” Ashkewe, Tilly Bridges & Susan Bridges, Alison Cybe, Michael Dismuke, Nathan Dowdell, Keith Garrett, Patrick Goodman, Jim Johnson, Erin Macdonald, PhD, Aaron M Pollyea, J.D. Kennedy, Chris McCarver, Al Spader, Troy Mepyans, Oz Mills

warhammer40000_darkheresysecondedition_c.human_name: Warhammer Age of Sigmar Soulbound: Core
warhammer40000_darkheresysecondedition_c.description_text: Dive into perilous action and explore the Mortal Realms in the official roleplaying game for Warhammer Age of Sigmar. Answer the call of the gods! Become Soulbound and save the people of the realms from the ruinous forces of chaos, death and destruction!

developers.developer-name: Emmet Byrne, Zak Dale-Clutterbuck, David Guymer, Elaine Lithgow, TS Luikart, Dominic McDowall, Katrina Ostrander, Josh Reynolds, Clint Werner

warhammerfantasyroleplay_corerulebook.description_text: The Wrath & Glory Rulebook is everything you need to roleplay grim and glorious adventures in the Gilead System.

developers.developer-name: Zak Dale-Clutterbuck, Chris Handley, Eleanor Hingley, Elaine Lithgow, TS Luikart, Dominic McDowall, Jonathan Woodhouse and Ross Watson

intothecessandcitadel.description_text: Into the Cess and Citadel offers system agnostic tools to turn any fantasy city into a terrible place to be. It drips with theme and threatens to burst with random roll tables, monsters, cursed items, mapping tools, faction profiles, NPCs, and plot hooks.

gijoeroleplayinggame.description_text: In the G.I. JOE Roleplaying game, create your own Joe by choosing your military training origin, personal traits, and role within the G.I. Joe organization to become a Real American Hero and save the day! This digital book contains everything you need to create your own G.I. JOE character and play the game.

pirateborgcorebook.description_text: PIRATE BORG is a scurvy-ridden, rules-light, art heavy tabletop RPG. Inspired by history, fantasy, horror and rum. Your cutlass & flintlock won’t save you from the hordes of skeletons, the Kraken, or even your own crew.

bluebeardsbride.description_text: Explore Bluebeard's mansion and create your own beautifully tragic version of the dark fairy tale with Bluebeard's Bride. Experience the nightmarish memories that haunt the rooms of this broken place and discover the truth of what happened here.

developers.developer-name: Whitney "Strix" Beltrán, Marissa Kelly, Sarah Doom

timewatch.callout: Best Game (Nominee), Product of the Year (Nominee)
timewatch.description_text: Rollicking game of time travelling agents fighting to preserve the 'correct' timeline against interference by psychic dinosaurs, atomic mutant cockroaches, renegade time travellers and other meddlers.

intothewyrdandwild.description_text: Into the Wyrd and Wild asks “why travel through the wilderness to a dungeon, when the wilderness could be the dungeon?” This system agnostic tool kit offers a huge bestiary, forest-themed spells and items, wilderness factions who really don’t like outsiders, and mapping tools to create a forest dungeon.

achtungcthulhu2d20playersguidepdf.description_text:
A New Secret War begins!

Welcome to the Secret War in this fast-paced pulp-influenced rollercoaster of an RPG which nimbly mixes the sanity-challenging terror of Lovecraftian cosmic horror, with the chaos and heroism of World War II.

Enter a world of audacious Allied agents, malicious Nazi villains and the unfathomable gods and monsters of the Mythos themselves, each striving for supremacy in mankind’s darkest yet finest hour!

Answer the call with the dauntless men and women of the Allied occult forces: Britain’s Section M, the United States’ Majestic, or the brave Resistance, all willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to hold back the legions of the Nazi occult.

Battle the Black Sun, Nazi warrior-sorcerers supreme, who use foul magic and summoned creatures from nameless dimensions to dominate the battlefields of men. Struggle against Nachtwölfe, the Night Wolves, who utilise technology, biological enhancements, and wunderwaffen (wonder weapons) to win the war for Germany. Can you prevail against such overwhelming odds, or will you succumb, like so many others, to the terror of the Nazi occult or the malign influence of the Mythos?

This is your story to tell!

Inside this 178+ page full colour PDF you’ll find:

  • Complete rules for playing Achtung! Cthulhu, using a custom version of the cinematic 2d20 system to create thrilling scenes, awesome adventures, and epic campaigns.

  • A complete step-by-step guide to building your Secret War operative which mixes archetype, background and characteristic to create a truly unique agent.

  • Use singular talents, powerful weapons, and mighty vehicles to take the fight to the Nazis.

  • Explore an innovate new magical system which allows you to wield powerful sorcery. 

  • Play as a Celtic druid or Norse Runeweaver, or harness the uncanny power of the mind as a psychic operative.

  • Created by a team of Lovecraft adepts and second world war aficionados who have crafted an RPG which is easy to pick up and play, but boasts huge depth and flavour!

 

What is Achtung! Cthulhu?

Achtung! Cthulhu is a setting for Lovecraftian roleplaying during World War II, which allows players to discover the truth behind the malign influence of the Mythos on the Nazi war machine and beyond, as conflict engulfs the globe during 1939-1945.

In this pulp-influenced world of brave Allied heroes and dauntless two-fisted adventure, players will take on the roles of Allied servicemen and women, secret agents, members of the resistance or even hapless civilians caught up in the wider conflict. All stand firm against the twisted might of the Nazi occult: the Cult of the Black Sun, who wield foul magic and summon captive horrors in their bid unleash Yog-Sothoth and Nachtwölfe, their nominal allies and rivals who place their trust in Atlantean technology, weird science, and strange wonder weapons to prevail.

Players will experience a world where dread secrets and powerful artefacts lie forgotten in ancient ruins, abandoned sites and forgotten cities, and peer deep into dusty tomes and manuscripts seeking to understand eldritch knowledge that was never meant for the sight of mortals. They’ll arm themselves with experimental technology and deadly weapons and learn to wield powerful magical spells or harness potent psychic powers to fight against this uncanny threat.

They’ll also encounter exotic native races like the Deep Ones, undersea worshippers of the dreaming god Cthulhu, or the strange Mi-Go, fungoid-insectoid beings from the furthest corners of the solar system who have come to Earth for an unknown purpose. Towering over them all are the monsters, entities and gods of the Mythos themselves, who seek to take advantage of the chaos of the second world war to extend their dominion over the minds of men.

Will your heroes prevail against all odds, or will they, like so many others before, fall to the malign influence of the Mythos? That is your story to tell…

developers.developer-name: Nathan Dowdell, John Houlihan, Richard August, Brad Bell, Richard L Gale, Benn Graybeaton, Bill Heron, Mari Tokuda, Sam Webb

achtungcthulhu2d20gamemastersguidepdf.description_text:
Direct the course of the new Secret War!

 

Welcome to the Secret War in this fast-paced pulp-influenced rollercoaster of an RPG which nimbly mixes the sanity-challenging terror of Lovecraftian cosmic horror, with the chaos and heroism of World War II.

 

As a gamemaster you will bring to life this  pulp-influenced world of brave Allied heroes and dauntless two-fisted adventure, guiding the heroic actions of players while also directing the twisted might of the Nazi occult: the Cult of the Black Sun, who wield foul magic and summon captive horrors and

Nachtwölfe

, their rivals who place their trust in Atlantean technology, weird science, and strange wonder weapons. 

You will shape a world where dread secrets and powerful artefacts lie forgotten in ancient ruins, where dusty tomes are replete with eldritch knowledge, and you’ll arm players with experimental technology, deadly weapons and powerful magic, to do battle with this uncanny threat. 

You’ll bring to life exotic races like the Deep Ones, undersea worshippers of the dreaming god Cthulhu, or the strange Mi-Go, fungoid-insectoid beings who have come to Earth for an unknown purpose. You’ll also control the sanity-sapping monsters, entities and gods of the Mythos themselves, who seek to take advantage of the chaos of the second world war to extend their dominion over the minds of men. 

Will your players prevail against all odds, or will they, like so many others before, fall to the malign influence of the Mythos? That is your story to shape and tell… 

Inside this Gamesmaster's Guide 260+ page full colour PDF you’ll find: 

  • Dedicated advice on the art of gamemastering including managing the game economy and specific tips for creating memorable characters, adventures and campaigns to thrill and delight your players. 

  • Major new lore and detailed background information on the six major factions contesting the Secret War: Section M, Majestic, Black Sun,

    Nachtwölfe

    , the Deep Ones and Mi-Go including their backgrounds, history, hierarchy, secret bases and missions and goals. 

  • A vast repository of hidden lore and forbidden magical knowledge including new Mythos books and tomes, powerful ritualistic magic, plus the damnable spellbooks of Nyarlathotep, Yog-Sothoth and dread Cthulhu himself! 

  • Arm your players with a wealth of new weapons and espionage devices from secret government labs and classified research departments with the Secret Weapons of the Secret War chapter. 

  • Complete profiles and statistics for the powerful heroes and villains of the Secret War, the men and women who do battle for the fate of mankind, plus a huge bestiary brimming with all the terrifying gods, monsters and entities of the Mythos themselves.

NOTE! The Achtung! Cthulhu Player's Guide contains the full core cinematic 2d20 rules for actual play and you’ll require that book/PDF to play the game.

 

What is Achtung! Cthulhu?

Achtung! Cthulhu is a setting for Lovecraftian roleplaying during World War II, which allows players to discover the truth behind the malign influence of the Mythos on the Nazi war machine and beyond, as conflict engulfs the globe during 1939-1945.

In this pulp-influenced world of brave Allied heroes and dauntless two-fisted adventure, players will take on the roles of Allied servicemen and women, secret agents, members of the resistance or even hapless civilians caught up in the wider conflict. All stand firm against the twisted might of the Nazi occult: the Cult of the Black Sun, who wield foul magic and summon captive horrors in their bid unleash Yog-Sothoth and Nachtwölfe, their nominal allies and rivals who place their trust in Atlantean technology, weird science, and strange wonder weapons to prevail.

Players will experience a world where dread secrets and powerful artefacts lie forgotten in ancient ruins, abandoned sites and forgotten cities, and peer deep into dusty tomes and manuscripts seeking to understand eldritch knowledge that was never meant for the sight of mortals. They’ll arm themselves with experimental technology and deadly weapons and learn to wield powerful magical spells or harness potent psychic powers to fight against this uncanny threat.

They’ll also encounter exotic native races like the Deep Ones, undersea worshippers of the dreaming god Cthulhu, or the strange Mi-Go, fungoid-insectoid beings from the furthest corners of the solar system who have come to Earth for an unknown purpose. Towering over them all are the monsters, entities and gods of the Mythos themselves, who seek to take advantage of the chaos of the second world war to extend their dominion over the minds of men.

Will your heroes prevail against all odds, or will they, like so many others before, fall to the malign influence of the Mythos? That is your story to tell…

developers.developer-name: Nathan Dowdell, John Houlihan, Richard August, Brad Bell, Richard L Gale, Benn Graybeaton, Bill Heron, Mari Tokuda, Sam Webb

warhammer40000_blackcrusade_corerulebook.human_name: Warhammer 40,000 Roleplay: Imperium Maledictum Starter Set
warhammer40000_blackcrusade_corerulebook.description_text: Heresy and corruption have taken root in the Macharian Sector, a teeming expanse of industrious worlds in the God Emperor’s Imperium of Man. The fate of an entire sector lies in doubt. Powerful individuals from across the Imperium’s factions and their agents vie for control against dark cults, traitors, daemons and vile xenos who lurk shrouded in the ever-encroaching darkness.

developers.developer-name: Christopher Colston, Zak Dale-Clutterbuck, John Dunn, Michael Duxbury, Lisa Farrell, Salim Hakima, D.G. Laderoute, TS Luikart, Pádraig Murphy, Samuel Poots, Sam Taylor and Frederic Walker

epyllion.description_text:
Dragonia faces a threat we dragons have all but forgotten. Inside each of us are seeds of Darkness waiting to take root in doubt, anger, and sorrow. You and your fellow dragons— although small now—must protect Dragonia from the growing Darkness...and learn what it means to be a true friend.  -- Tass the Gigantic, Councilmember

Epyllion is a tabletop role-playing game about young drakes who investigate rumors, solve problems, and discover the truth of a growing evil in Dragonia. While you play, you and your friends tell awesome stories, explore what it means to be a drake of Dragonia, and discover the value of friendship through magical, whimsical, and heartfelt adventures.

This easy-to-learn adventure game helps you tell the stories of a brave clutch of young dragons through a supportive yet simple system that promotes active listening, creativity, and cooperative play.

rebelscum2ndedition.description_text: REBEL SCUM tells the story of how scrappy, anti-fascist heroes can fight back against a government with unlimited power (including giant lasers and space magic). Inspired by a love for a certain line of 3 and 3/4 inch action figures, this TTRPG invites you to imagine cinematic space drama of your very own.

swordsoftheserpentine.description_text: A sword & sorcery game of daring heroism, sly politics, and bloody savagery, set in a fantasy city rife with skullduggery and death. The rules adapt the GUMSHOE investigative roleplaying system to create a fantasy RPG with a focus on high-action roleplaying and investigation.

stealingstories.description_text: Stealing Stories for the Devil is a zero-prep roleplaying game of saving the universe by bending reality as you pull off the perfect heist.

bluerose.description_text: This beautiful, full-color book contains everything needed to create and tell stories of heroic envoys of the Sovereign’s Finest as they protect their homeland of Aldis from threats like the shadowy Kingdom of Kern and the fanatical Theocracy of Jarzon, as well as monsters and artifacts from the cruel reign of the Sorcerer Kings.

developers.developer-name: Jeremy Crawford, Steve Kenson, Jack Norris, Chris Pramas, John Snead

onelastfight.description_text: One Last Fight is a roguelike card-based roleplaying game where 1-4 players journey to defeat their final Nemesis - or die trying. Players create their adventurers’ backstories together, establish the story of their Nemesis, and work together to overcome a gauntlet of Challenges until they find themselves in their Nemesis’ Lair.

developers.developer-name: Ethan Hudgens, Jordan Richer, Chris Pinch

powerrangersroleplayinggame.description_text: Become a Power Ranger and protect Angel Grove and the Earth against the evil forces of Rita Repulsa, Lord Zedd, Master Vile, and more in the epic world of Power Rangers! In the Power Rangers Roleplaying Game, create your ultimate Power Ranger persona by combining personal traits, childhood influences, and your chosen Ranger color to make a hero worthy of the Power!

outgunnedsuperheroes.description_text: Outgunned Superheroes is a cinematic TTRPG inspired by classics of the superhero genre. In Outgunned Superheroes, the Players take on the role of superheroes standing against an evil Villain who has become a threat to their city, the World, or the whole Universe.

darkesthouse.description_text: The Darkest House is an app for Mac or Windows that delivers a mega-adventure made for the game you’re playing right now, to be integrated into your campaign regardless of the setting or game system. Think of it like an RPG book that’s been reimagined from the ground up for the online environment.

uncanny.description_text: An expansion for the award-winning RPG Sleepaway focused on the Strange and mysterious creatures that exist at the edge of camp. Includes new characters, setting elements, rituals and more.

tenebria.description_text: Tenebria is a light survival horror and city-building roleplaying game set after the collapse of the Roman empire. Play soldiers, “barbarians”, and refugees as they learn to work together to make their isolated camp into a stable city.

starleedavidson.description_text: Starlee Davidson is a polymorph game of Tarot, Motorcycles, and Self Healing. A no prep TTRPG, the cards lead the story for The Oracle and the players as they take on different roles in a psychedelic explosion of mystery, mysticism, and motorbikes.

transformersroleplayinggamecorerulebook.description_text: In the Transformers Roleplaying game, create your own Autobot character and wage your battle to destroy the evil forces of the Decepticons! Whether defending Earth against Megatron’s plans of attack, searching for elusive stores of Energon, or protecting innocent humans and Cybertronians alike, your game is only limited by the stories you create!

tabletopgaymers.description_text:
Donations to support TABLETOP GAYMERS are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Tabletop Gaymers Inc is a nonprofit organization whose mission is championing the visibility and inclusion of the lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer/questioning, intersex, asexual, and others (LGBTQIA+) community through tabletop gaming. We organize events, educational panels, information booths, and distribute pride swag at gaming conventions like Gen Con, Origins, and PAX Unplugged.

from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Cartel, Uncanny, Epyllion, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Become the main character of your favorite novel, film series, or game with this giant bundle of tabletop roleplaying books! This TTRPG library features core rulebooks and adventures set in tons of different franchises, from Doctor Who and Warhammer to Cthulhu, Transformers, and even My Little Pony! Basically, if you’re a fan of something, it’s probably in here. You’ll also find core books from classic roleplaying franchises like Return to Dark Tower and original storylines like Household and Visigoths vs. Mall Goths! Assemble your friends, grab a set of dice, and pick from over 50 TTRPG books to plan your next one-night adventure or neverending campaign. Grab this bundle now for the price of your choosing, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25, 2027.
from_bundle.author: Magpie Games

basic_data.human_name: The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Your new career in game development is only a click away with The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle! No prior knowledge is needed for this curated collection of lessons from GameDev.tv—just come prepared with a curious mind and a passion for gaming. Get started today and create your own RPG, 2D adventure, and more with courses like Unity Turn Based Strategy Course and Unity Real Time Strategy Course. Get the expert instruction you need from pros in the field, and help support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25th, 2027.
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Unlock your creative side with Unity
basic_data.description:
Unlock your creative side with Unity. Your new career in game development is only a click away with The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle! No prior knowledge is needed for this curated collection of lessons from GameDev.tv—just come prepared with a curious mind and a passion for gaming. Get started today and create your own RPG, 2D adventure, and more with courses like Unity Turn Based Strategy Course and Unity Real Time Strategy Course. Get the expert instruction you need from pros in the field, and help support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

Over the last decade, GameDev.tv has helped 2 million+ students learn game development - from their very first line of code to building full games. Whether you’re working in Godot, Unity, Unreal or Blender, we focus on practical, hands-on learning that builds real skills, confidence, and momentum. And you’re never doing it alone - our community of devs and instructors is there to help you get good and keep going.

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $1,640. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. Keys are redeemed through GameDev.tv website

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support Trees, Water & People. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

leveldesignfundamentalscourse_getgoodatm.description_text:
My levels feel... fine. But fine isn't fun.""

If that hits close to home, this course is for you. Good level design isn't magic - it's a craft. And once you learn how it works, you'll see it everywhere.

We dig into real levels from real games to reverse-engineer what makes them stick. The tension, the pacing, the moment a level just gets you - none of that happened by accident. Someone designed every beat on purpose. This course shows you how they did it, and how you can too.

You'll walk away with design frameworks, layout patterns you can swipe for your own games, a 10-step workflow, and greyboxing techniques that work in the real world - not just in theory.

Whether you're heading into your first game jam or building your dream indie project, stop hoping your levels turn out okay. Start designing them to be great.fix description

unityturnbasedstrategycourse.description_text:
Are you looking to level up your game development skills and take your projects to the next level?

Want to make your own turn-based strategy game, similar to XCOM or Final Fantasy Tactics?*

This is the course for you!

In this course, you’ll take your skills from beginner to advanced, learn to manage and organise a complex project. You’ll create a custom Grid System and learn advanced Programming concepts, such as; C# generics, C# events, custom structs, enemy AI, A* Pathfinding and much more!!

* Even if you’re not interested in turn-based strategy games, these skills are super transferable to other types of games.

We’re really excited to have teamed up with YouTuber Code Monkey, to bring you this awesome Unity content.

unityshadergraphcourse.description_text:
Unlock the magic of Unity Shader Graph and create visuals that’ll make your players say “Wow!” Dive into our course and master this powerful tool to craft stunning, dynamic effects for your games—no art degree needed.

In this course, you’ll learn to design immersive materials, jaw-dropping lighting, and gameplay-enhancing effects with Shader Graph. From procedural textures that add rich detail to custom lighting that brings your scenes to life, you’ll level up your visual storytelling skills and create effects that truly pop.

Perfect for both beginners and pros, this hands-on, project-based course guides you through each step with high-quality tutorials and practical exercises. Let’s make your games unforgettable—grab this bundle and get ready to wow!

treespeoplewater.description_text:
Donations to support Trees, Water & People are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Trees, Water & People is guided by the philosophy that the best way to fight climate change is to involve local people directly in the design and implementation of environmental and economic development initiatives. Their mission is to improve lives by helping communities to protect, conserve, and manage their natural resources.

For over twenty years, Trees, Water & People has been a leader in the design and implementation of programs that produce tangible benefits for people and the planet. Today, their work is more urgent than ever, as climate change threatens the livelihoods of millions of people.

Trees Water People was not involved in the selection of the content in this promotion and the views, opinions, and ideas expressed in the content are neither endorsed by, nor represent the views and opinions of Trees Water People.

programmingdesignpatternsforunitycourse.human_name: Programming Design Patterns For Unity Course
programmingdesignpatternsforunitycourse.description_text:
Want to take your coding to the next level? Learning how to apply programming best practices to your Unity projects will help!

Do you ever wonder why your code has so many bugs or find yourself perplexed by code you wrote months ago?

Maybe you've heard of Programming Patterns but don't understand when to use them, or you want to know how to actually implement these Patterns in Unity?

This course covers fundamental programming best practices (including how to write clean, maintainable code), what problems to solve with Programming Patterns, how to write common Patterns in Unity and how Programming Patterns implement best practices.

You'll need a strong understanding of basic C# programming (classes, methods, ifs, loops) and some familiarity with more advanced concepts (inheritance, interfaces, events). And don’t worry if you don’t know this stuff at the moment, we cover all of these topics in the other courses in this bundle.

If you’re ready to code better, this is the course for you!

unityproceduralgenerationcourse.description_text:
Want to build infinite game levels that stay fresh every time?

Learn to code your own procedural dungeons with hallways, rooms and just the right amount of chaos.

Turn 2D layouts into full 3D scenes with Marching Squares and power it all with Scriptable Objects.

Add runtime NavMesh so players and enemies can actually get around without faceplanting into walls.

Spawn loot, baddies and decorations using rules that keep things interesting (and not super samey).

You’ll level up your C# skills too, with advanced techniques that make your code lean and mean.

Perfect for devs who know their way around Unity and want to create replayable worlds.

Dive into the bundle and start generating awesome levels on the fly now!

unityrealtimestrategycourse.description_text:
Ever wanted to build your own RTS but didn’t know where to start?

This course teaches you how to create the full package, units, buildings, fog of war, upgrades and more.

You’ll wrangle behaviour trees for smarter AI, set up scalable systems and ditch the spaghetti code for clean, config-driven goodness.

Use ScriptableObjects and event buses to keep your game tidy (and future you sane).

Add new units and upgrades straight from the editor - no more hard-coded chaos.

If you know your way around Unity and C#, this is your chance to level up and go full commander mode.

Pick up the bundle and start building the RTS game you’ve always wanted to play.

fromblendertounitycourse.description_text:
Get your Blender characters working in Unity - clean, optimised and game-ready.

You’ll build a solid export workflow for characters, props and animations, baking textures, setting up LODs, rigging with Rigify and animating with the Non-Linear Animation Editor.

Export character actions that just work inside Unity, no broken materials or import weirdness.

Perfect for devs and artists ready to bring their own characters into the engine. Grab the bundle and get building.

unitymultiplayercodingandnetworkingngo.human_name: Unity Multiplayer Coding & Networking NGO Course
unitymultiplayercodingandnetworkingngo.description_text:
Ready to make your own large scale game that supports dozens of players?

Learn to build an online game using the latest and greatest framework from Unity, which makes it easy to build multiplayer games (and saves time!)

From building the core gameplay, to taking your game online, to making it deployable as a dedicated server and learning to integrate matchmaking. You'll do it all! Unity is making the process easier than ever with its new Netcode For GameObjects (NGO) framework.

You’ll make a multiplayer top-down shooter, you can play with dozens of people over the internet. And learn how to deploy a dedicated server with matchmaking!

We’re making a .io style game (like slither.io and agar.io), that can accommodate dozens of players. Through that process you’ll build the skills to make your own competitive or cooperative multiplayer game in any genre that interests you.

Jump in and start creating your own multiplayer game now. You’ll be playing it with your friends in no time!

unity2drpg_completecombatsystemcourse.human_name: Unity 2D RPG: Complete Combat System Course
unity2drpg_completecombatsystemcourse.description_text:
Ready to create your own classic 2D top-down RPG game in Unity?

Building an RPG is an amazing way to level-up your game development skills, so grab your magic staff, watch out for projectile grapes and start improving your game development right now!

Role Playing Games can be complex to create, with many interacting gameplay systems. We’ve made it easy for you, this course teaches you step-by-step how to make the foundations of any good RPG - from scratch!

You'll learn 2D top-down movement, combining C# and animator components, a combat system with multiple weapons, scene management & scene persistence, tilemap, rule tiles, animated tiles, scene workflow and much more!

unity25dturn-basedrpgcourse.description_text:
Ready to unlock the secrets of 2.5D turn-based games with Unity and C#? Whether you’re just stepping into game dev or levelling up, this course has you covered.

You’ll create your own turn-based combat system that’s both fun to play and super flexible, thanks to the magic of scriptable objects. Dive deep into Unity’s tools—from Cinemachine for cinematic flair, to particle effects that add major pizzazz!

Learn to craft immersive worlds with 3D models and sprites, bringing characters to life as they leap into battle. We’ll walk you through building a scalable battle system, making it easy to navigate.

Perfect for beginner to beginner+ devs, this course turns your game ideas into real, playable worlds. Join us and start crafting your dream games!

unitygamefeelcourse.description_text:
Ever feel that your game just doesn’t feel quite right?

Learn how to fix that by implementing a bunch of fun systems, mechanics and effects to enhance the way your game feels from a player perspective!

Building upon solid C# and Unity foundations, it’s time for you to level up.

Increase your C# understanding, learning how to implement things like a struct, centralized input, interfaces, and several game design patterns.

And expand on your Unity knowledge by learning screen shake, post-processing effects, 2D lighting, particle effects, tilemap prefabs, masking, Unity events, and much more!

Plus, you’ll even build an expandable Audio Manager system that can be used in other mid-sized scalable projects.

You’ll start with a 2D side scroller shooter base template and expand on it to get things feeling the way they should.

Make a game that “feels” fun to play with a clean and snappy player controller, a gun that’s fun to shoot, audio and screen visuals to give your player feedback, as well as animations to bring everything together.

Grab the bundle today and get your game feeling just right!

completeunity3dcdevelopercourse.description_text:
Ready to level up your game dev skills? Dive into our Unity 6 course and learn from the team that’s taught over a million students to code and build games. Unity is a powerful 3D engine, but it can feel like a boss fight for beginners. Don’t worry—we’ve got your back with step-by-step projects that make coding fun and easy.

You’ll create five games, each teaching you core skills. Dodge obstacles, blast aliens, and master everything from C# basics to advanced stuff like procedural generation and AI. Jump into projects like "Obstacle Dodge," "Rocket Boost," and "Sharp Shooter," where you’ll learn player controls, physics, AI, and more.

With clear guidance, lifetime access, and all files included, we make sure you’re set up for success. No coding experience? No problem—start from scratch and go pro in no time.

What are you waiting for? Dive into Unity 6 and start crafting your dream games!

Trees, Water & People is guided by the philosophy that the best way to fight climate change is to involve local people directly in the design and implementation of environmental and economic development initiatives. nba2k26.callout: Bragging rights are on the line. Showcase your bag of moves with hyper realism, and challenge your friends, or rivals, in NBA 2K26’s competitive modes—and leave no doubt that you wear the crown.
nba2k26.description_text:
Dominate every possession with immersive technology that directly translates NBA footage into realistic gameplay. Feel more connected to every dribble and crossover with revamped size-ups and experience fast-paced, dynamic movement with all-new ProPLAY features.

SQUAD UP IN THE CITY

Build a transcendent MyPLAYER and climb the competitive ranks to reach the pinnacle of NBA stardom in an all-new MyCAREER journey. Team up with friends in a stunning, streamlined City, earn recognition and increase your REP, and battle rival squads for Park supremacy.

UNITE STARS IN MyTEAM

Collect and compete with past and present legends of the game in MyTEAM. Assemble a star-studded roster, put your dream team to the test in new single-player and multiplayer modes, and acquire new cards to make your MyTEAM fantasy a reality.

YOUR TEAM, YOUR STORY

Lead an NBA franchise as a General Manager in MyNBA. Choose from all 30 teams, experience 30 unique MyGM storylines with real-world inspiration, and chase the ultimate goal: to win a championship. Influence the future of the sport and leave an indelible mark on the league.

*Internet connection and NBA 2K Account required to redeem and use bonus content. Terms apply.

Play Now, MyNBA, and The W are available offline. All other game modes and features require Internet connection and may require online account registration (varies 13+).

covenanthouse.description_text:
Donations to support Covenant House are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Covenant House is the nation's largest movement providing food, shelter, immediate crisis care, and ongoing services to homeless and trafficked young people. Founded in 1972 in New York, Covenant House has grown to serve over 46,000 youth annually in 30 cities across the United States, Canada, and Latin America. At Covenant House, we offer basic necessities to any homeless young person who knocks on our door—with unconditional love—no questions asked and no strings attached. Once a young person is staying with us, our programs provide the structure they need to get off the street, plan for the future, and achieve independence. Our full continuum of services include: 

  • Food
  • Shelter
  • Healthcare
  • Legal Services
  • Educational Services
  • Employment TrainingMental Health Counseling
  • Mother and Children Services
  • Long-term and Permanent Housing

olliolliworld_radedition.callout: OlliOlli World is a bold skateboarding action-platformer that’s bursting with personality
olliolliworld_radedition.description_text:
OlliOlli World Rad Edition includes:
• OlliOlli World
• First story expansion "" Void Riders"" containing an entirely new biome, levels, characters, gameplay and customization unlocks. Coming Summer 2022.
• Second story expansion containing an entirely new biome, levels, characters, gameplay and customization unlocks. Coming by Fall 2022.
• ""Close Encounter Skate Deck”

OlliOlli World is a bold new skateboarding action-platformer that’s bursting with personality. Flip and flow through the vivid and vibrant world of Radlandia, meeting colorful characters as you grind, trick, and air your way to discover the mystical skate gods on your quest for Gnarvana.

Traverse a delightful and weird world as you take on missions, challenges, and make new friends along the way. Customize your character’s looks, tricks, and style while you experience explorable levels with multiple paths that provide an array of opportunities for player expression. Challenge the world in Leagues or dare a friend to beat your best tricks on one of millions of sharable levels. Experience the accessibility, depth, and player freedom as you dive into the signature flow state gameplay of OlliOlli World.

OlliOlli World marks the third entry in the critically-acclaimed OlliOlli series from Roll7, the BAFTA and multi-award-winning independent studio.


KEY FEATURES

Welcome to Radlandia!
Take a trip across a lush skateboarding utopia that is filled to the brim with eccentric characters and vibrant locations that are begging to be explored. Find your grind in Inflatable Alley or blaze down Los Vulgas to discover new paths, fresh side quests, rad rewards, and epic trick opportunities. All perfectly complemented by a hand-picked compilation of IDM and Electronica tracks.

Play at your level
Super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay to ensure a silky smooth ride. Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you with open arms, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb. Think you’ve got what it takes? Achieve mastery through millions of unique levels in sandbox mode or compete against rivals around the globe in Leagues with a hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine in your battle for the highest score.

Freedom of expression
Cruise through Radlandia's epic skate-haven and prove your skills to unlock special rewards that let you customize your character’s looks, tricks and style. Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!

pgatour2k25.callout: Step onto golf’s biggest stages and prove you can rise among the greats.
pgatour2k25.description_text:
Step onto golf’s biggest stages and prove you can rise among the greats. Compete in the ultimate test: The PGA Championship, The U.S. Open, and The Open Championship make their PGA TOUR 2K debut.

Rise through the ranks in an expanded MyCAREER, where every round builds your legacy. Create your path to greatness with new MyPLAYER customization, upgraded Skill Trees, and advanced Course Designer tools. Then take your shot against the best in ranked, casual, and cross-platform multiplayer.

You didn’t show up for second place.


GRAB A CLUB. CHASE GREATNESS.

Team up or face off in Match Play, Scramble, or Skins - online or local. Compete in cross-platform societies, earn seasonal rewards, and rise through daily and weekly tournaments.


ON GOLF’S BIGGEST STAGES

Take on legends like Tiger Woods or step into their shoes and feel what it’s like to master some of the hardest courses in the world. In a PGA TOUR 2K franchise first, test your grit at The PGA Championship, U.S. Open and The Open Championship.


YOUR CAREER. YOUR LEGACY. YOUR WAY.

Dynamically simulate rounds, train for tournaments, and evolve your player through new Attribute Point and Equipment Progression systems.


SEASONS. BACK AND BETTER THAN EVER.

Earn rewards, climb the Ranked leaderboards, and experience regular content updates. Progress at your own pace through past Seasons.

PGA TOUR 2K25: AIM FOR GREATNESS

nba2k26_35000vcpack.callout: Note: Currency may take time to display in-game after redemption
nba2k26_35000vcpack.description_text: This currency pack contains 35,000 VC for use in NBA 2K26.

wwe2k26mondaynightwaredition_35offcoupon.human_name: WWE 2K26 Monday Night War Edition - 35% Off Coupon
wwe2k26mondaynightwaredition_35offcoupon.description_text:
Get 35% off WWE 2K26 Monday Night War Edition in the Humble Store!

NOTE: Expires July 3rd, 2026, 6pm PT. Does not stack with Humble Store sales.

Reignite the rivalry between Monday Night Raw and WCW Monday Nitro with the WWE 2K26 Monday Night War Edition, the ultimate package stacked with legendary Superstars, classic arenas, and more. Includes the Joe Hendry Pack, plus the King of Kings Edition Pack, Attitude Era Edition Pack, Monday Night War Edition Pack, Season Pass (1-6), the WrestleMania 42 Pack coming Summer 2026*, and more.

topspin2k25grandslamedition.callout: TopSpin 2K25 returns as a next-level tennis sim, bringing realistic court physics and challenging skill-based gameplay
topspin2k25grandslamedition.description_text:
Compete on the world’s biggest stages with the TopSpin 2K25 Grand Slam® Edition! Get the Grand Slam® Champions Pack, plus the Under the Lights Pack, New Wave Pack, Rookie Rise Pack, the All Access Pass, and 3-Day Early Access.

The Grand Slam® Edition includes:

- Grand Slam® Champions Pack, featuring a cosmetic Championship Racket and a Champion Serve.
- New Wave Pack containing Carlos Alcaraz, Iga Swiatek, and Frances Tiafoe Alternate Outfits, New Wave Glasses, New Wave Top, New Wave Bottoms, New Wave Shoes, and New Wave Wrist Bands.
- Rookie Rise Pack containing one MyPLAYER Boost to Level 10 and 1,700 VC.
- All Access Pass, including six Centre Court Season Passes, plus French Open, Wimbledon, US Open, and Australian Open T-Shirts.

WIN THE CAREER GRAND SLAM®
Travel the world as an up-and-coming pro, go toe-to-toe with the biggest names in tennis, and take Centre Court at Wimbledon, Roland-Garros, the US Open, and the Australian Open as you strive to become a Grand Slam® Champion in MyCAREER.

COMPETE AT ICONIC VENUES
Visit some of the most vibrant courts on the tennis circuit in TopSpin 2K25. From the four Grand Slam® tournaments to larger-than-life international arenas like Indian Wells, La Caja Mágica, Pala Alpitour, Foro Italico, and more.

TENNIS LEGENDS & RISING STARS
Play as tennis legends Roger Federer and Serena Williams, or serve up smashing highlights as Carlos Alcaraz, Iga Swiatek, Frances Tiafoe, Andre Agassi, and others. Choose from over 24 playable pros and unleash their explosive power and clever finesse against other players locally or online.

DOMINATE THE COURT ONLINE
Test your MyPLAYER's mettle and showcase your tennis prowess on the World Tour or step into the 2K Tour as a playable pro challenging players around the orld with cross-play support.

TRAIN WITH JOHN MCENROE
From power serves to gorgeous drop-shots, learn how to play like a legend with John McEnroe at the TopSpin Academy. Master advanced controls as you progress through a series of skill-sharpening drills and challenges to gain an edge on every surface.

PERSONALIZE YOUR MyPLAYER
Create a MyPLAYER tailored to your play style and define your look on the court! With a wide range of customization options, you can fine-tune your attributes and earn new Coaches, Fittings, and gear from adidas, HEAD, Lacoste, New Balance, Nike, Wilson, and more.

wwe2k26standardedition_35offcoupon.description_text:
Get 35% off WWE 2K26 in in the Humble Store!

NOTE: Expires July 3rd, 2026, 6pm PT. Does not stack with Humble Store sales.

THE SHOW NEVER STOPS
Run the world’s greatest show your way and live out your WWE fandom to the fullest. Experience the most expansive gameplay to date with rebellious Legends of the Attitude Era and Superstars of today.

MORE SUPERSTARS THAN EVER BEFORE
Featuring the most stacked lineup in franchise history with 400+ playable WWE Superstars and Legends including The Rock, Triple H, John Cena, Rhea Ripley, and fan-favorites like Rey Fénix, Rusev, and Blake Monroe.

2K SHOWCASE
Rewrite wrestling history and relive CM Punk’s greatest rivalries in a world where The Voice of the Voiceless never left, including fantasy historical scenarios. Punk’s rise, rebellion, and return make this the most personal Showcase yet.

NEW MATCH TYPES AND MORE
Bring the chaos to every corner of the ring with new match types, including I Quit, Inferno, and Dumpster. Plus, take the fight to The Island in the new Scrapyard Brawl arena, experience an updated progression system, and test your skills in MyFACTION with Quick Swap, a fast-paced, team-based mode. Enjoy interactive entrances, new crowd interactions, and fresh commentary from Booker T and Wade Barrett.

CONTROL YOUR UNIVERSE
The WWE Draft finally arrives in WWE 2K’s sandbox mode Universe in WWE 2K26. Create your own WWE Universe where you control weekly shows and PLEs, Superstar rivalries, and outcomes. Other new introductions include Universe Creation Wizard, Watch Show mode, improved Money in the Bank cash-ins, and additional Promo types.

COMMUNITY CREATIONS EXPANSION
Double your creative power with 200 CAS save slots! Community Creations now features expanded image capacity, deeper body and face morphing tools, and 2-tone hair color blending, giving you unprecedented freedom to craft the Superstars, arenas, and other creations of your dreams.

A NEW MyRISE ERA
Define your MySUPERSTAR’s journey through 2 new division-based storylines where heel or babyface decisions impact your MyPLAYER like never before as part of their comeback story. Keep playing even after the main stories are complete, with more unlockable content and achievements to earn for increased replayability.

VENTURE INTO AN EXPANDED ISLAND
Explore The Island, 2K’s WWE-themed world, now bigger and more social than ever. Choose one of three factions and battle for control alongside friends and family in co-op play, with a revamped progression system. Discover the new Scrapyard Brawl environment, tackle fresh Towers, and browse new shops and branded gear. Also featuring an expanded MySUPERSTAR builder with face-scan importing, plus upgraded quests complete with cutscenes and dialogue screens.

MyGM
Level up your strategy in WWE 2K26 with MyGM. This year, intergender matches, 5, 6, and 8-man matches, plus support for more match types than ever before, will vastly increase the number of possible matches and outcomes. More shows per season will pose new management challenges.

ASSEMBLE YOUR DREAM TEAM IN MyFACTION
Form your dream faction and compete with Superstars and legends in new intergender lineups and Quick Swap matches. Collect new card designs and boost your performance with the new Faction Chemistry with run-in support.

Certain features of the game, including online multiplayer, communication and other online features, may not be accessible by child accounts. A child means players under the age of 13, unless local laws specify differently.

covenanthouse.description_text:
Donations to support Covenant House are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Covenant House is the nation's largest movement providing food, shelter, immediate crisis care, and ongoing services to homeless and trafficked young people. Founded in 1972 in New York, Covenant House has grown to serve over 46,000 youth annually in 30 cities across the United States, Canada, and Latin America. At Covenant House, we offer basic necessities to any homeless young person who knocks on our door—with unconditional love—no questions asked and no strings attached. Once a young person is staying with us, our programs provide the structure they need to get off the street, plan for the future, and achieve independence. Our full continuum of services include: 

  • Food
  • Shelter
  • Healthcare
  • Legal Services
  • Educational Services
  • Employment TrainingMental Health Counseling
  • Mother and Children Services
  • Long-term and Permanent Housing
